35018.title: Trade, Labor Market Concentration, and Wages
35018.zh_title: 贸易、劳动力市场集中度与工资
35018.abstract: I estimate the effect of trade on local labor market concentration and its implications for wages using employer-employee linked data and tariff shocks from Brazil’s trade liberalization. Trade increased concentration by 7%, an effect driven by firm exit and worker flows to surviving import-competing firms. Increased concentration reduced wage take-home shares—estimated at 50 cents on the dollar pre-shock—enough to offset small wage gains from reallocation, but did not meaningfully reduce wages on net. Most of the wage declines attributed to Brazil's trade liberalization resulted instead from reductions in the marginal revenue product of labor. Incorporating informality reveals substantial regional heterogeneity.
35018.zh_abstract: 我利用雇主-雇员关联数据以及巴西贸易自由化带来的关税冲击，估计了贸易对当地劳动力市场集中度的影响及其对工资的启示。贸易使集中度提高了7%，这一效应是由企业退出以及工人流向幸存下来的进口竞争企业所驱动的。集中度的提高降低了工资的实得份额——在冲击前估计为每美元50美分——这足以抵消因重新配置带来的微小工资增长，但并未在净额上显著降低工资。归因于巴西贸易自由化的工资下降，大部分反而是由劳动力边际收入产品的减少所导致的。将非正规部门纳入考量后，揭示了显著的地区异质性。

35017.title: Real Effects of Academic Research Revisited
35017.zh_title: 学术研究的实际效应再探
35017.authors: Adam B. Jaffe, Laura B. Shupp, Valentina Tartari
35017.abstract: This Chapter surveys the findings of social science research on the contribution of universities to innovation and economic growth, both locally/regionally and globally. In the last several decades research has demonstrated universities’ causal effects through the mechanisms of knowledge creation, education and training of students, and technology transfer/entrepreneurship. The Chapter summarizes how the literature has studied each of these mechanisms, and how the findings have probed variation across disciplines and economic sectors. The depth and breadth of understanding have been advanced by new microdata and new methods of linking data across inventions, scientists and institutions, and by application of methods from network science. We emphasize that research has proven the importance of these effects on average, but to date has less to say about the determinants of success or failure in different contexts. These findings have implications for public policy to foster innovation both regionally and globally.
35017.zh_abstract: 本章综述了社会科学关于大学对创新和经济增长（无论是在本地/区域层面还是全球层面）贡献的研究发现。在过去几十年里，研究已经证明了大学通过知识创造、学生教育与培训以及技术转移/创业这些机制所产生的因果效应。本章总结了文献如何研究这些机制中的每一个，以及这些发现如何探讨了不同学科和经济部门之间的差异。新的微观数据、连接发明、科学家和机构的新方法，以及网络科学方法的应用，都推动了理解的深度和广度。我们强调，研究已经证明了这些效应在平均水平上的重要性，但迄今为止，对于不同情境下成功或失败的决定因素，研究能提供的见解较少。这些发现对于旨在促进区域和全球创新的公共政策具有启示意义。

35016.title: In the Fed’s Mind
35016.authors: Ali Kakhbod, Amir Kermani, Bernardo Maciel
35016.abstract: Does the Federal Reserve react to all inflation equally? We systematically analyze FOMC meeting records from 1937 to 2025 to construct meeting-level measures of the Fed’s real-time attribution of inflation to demand and supply pressures. We document substantial variation in these narratives over time and show that, since Volcker, the Fed has responded more aggressively to perceived demand-driven inflation. Consistent with this asymmetry, supply pressures have more persistent effects on realized inflation, while demand pressures' impact dissipates quickly. Financial markets also reflect this distinction: demand imbalances primarily move risk-neutral yields, whereas supply imbalances raise term premia and equity risk premia.
35016.zh_abstract: 美联储是否对所有通胀都做出同等反应？我们系统地分析了1937年至2025年的联邦公开市场委员会会议记录，构建了会议层面的衡量指标，用以反映美联储实时将通胀归因于需求压力和供给压力的叙事。我们记录了这些叙事随时间推移的显著变化，并表明，自沃尔克时代以来，美联储对感知到的需求驱动型通胀反应更为激进。与这种不对称性一致，供给压力对已实现通胀的影响更为持久，而需求压力的影响则迅速消散。金融市场也反映了这种区别：需求失衡主要影响风险中性收益率，而供给失衡则提高了期限溢价和股权风险溢价。
35016.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E31, E43, E52, E58

35014.title: The Economics of Postdoctoral Researcher Positions
35014.zh_title: 博士后研究人员职位的经济学
35014.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Joshua L. Rosenbloom
35014.abstract: This chapter examines the dramatic growth and evolving role of postdoctoral researchers in the U.S. scientific workforce from 1979 to 2023, highlighting a fourfold increase in postdoc numbers that outpaced growth in graduate students and faculty. We argue that this expansion reflects the fragmented nature of science funding, particularly the effects of the NIH budget doubling in the early 2000s, which increased both supply and demand for postdocs but ultimately worsened employment conditions. The chapter also explores the career outcomes of postdocs, noting limited economic returns outside academia and declining transitions to faculty roles. With recent declines in postdoc numbers, tightening immigration policies, and rising compensation, it seems likely that the U.S. may have reached “peak postdoc,” potentially leading to reduced future research output. The chapter concludes with a call for improved data and further research to better understand postdocs’ roles in scientific production and career development.
35014.zh_abstract: 本章考察了1979年至2023年间美国科学劳动力中博士后研究人员数量的急剧增长和角色演变，强调了博士后人数增长了四倍，其增速超过了研究生和教职人员的增长。我们认为，这种扩张反映了科学资助的碎片化性质，特别是21世纪初美国国立卫生研究院预算翻倍的影响，这既增加了博士后的供给也增加了需求，但最终恶化了就业条件。本章还探讨了博士后的职业成果，指出在学术界之外的经济回报有限，并且向教职岗位的转变在减少。鉴于近期博士后数量的下降、移民政策的收紧以及薪酬的上升，美国似乎可能已经达到了“博士后峰值”，这可能导致未来研究产出的减少。本章最后呼吁改进数据并进行进一步研究，以更好地理解博士后在科学生产和职业发展中的作用。

35013.title: Dynamic Adjustment to Trade Shocks
35013.zh_title: 对贸易冲击的动态调整
35013.authors: Junyuan Chen, Carlos Góes, Marc-Andreas Muendler, Fabian Trottner
35013.abstract: Global trade flows and supply chains adjust gradually. Empirical estimates of the trade elasticity for the short run are a fraction of those for the long run and suggest that trade is subject to substantive dynamic frictions. We develop a tractable framework that provides microfoundations for trade adjustment and rationalizes estimation of a time-varying trade elasticity. The model features forward-looking firms facing sticky sourcing choices and nests a version of the Eaton-Kortum model as a limiting long- run case. We calibrate the model and quantify the impacts of two events: the 2004 EU Eastern enlargement (an anticipated change) and the 2018 US-China trade war (an arguably unanticipated change). Our findings suggest that sourcing frictions and anticipation effects alter the time pattern of specialization, can result in short-term welfare losses but long-term gains, and can drive marked trade adjustments before anticipated shocks occur.
35013.zh_abstract: 全球贸易流动和供应链是逐步调整的。短期贸易弹性的实证估计值仅为长期贸易弹性的一小部分，这表明贸易受到显著的动态摩擦影响。我们开发了一个易于处理的框架，为贸易调整提供了微观基础，并合理化了时变贸易弹性的估计。该模型以面临粘性采购选择的前瞻性企业为特征，并将伊顿-科图姆模型的一个版本作为极限长期情况嵌套其中。我们对模型进行了校准，并量化了两个事件的影响：2004年欧盟东扩（一个预期到的变化）和2018年中美贸易战（一个可以说是未预期到的变化）。我们的研究结果表明，采购摩擦和预期效应改变了专业化的时间模式，可能导致短期福利损失但长期收益，并且可以在预期冲击发生之前推动显著的贸易调整。

35012.title: Planning under Diagnostic Uncertainty: Question-Driven Learning in the Age of AI
35012.zh_title: 诊断不确定性下的规划：人工智能时代由问题驱动的学习
35012.abstract:
Many important economic decisions depend not only on acquiring information, but on determining which questions are worth asking before committing to an action. Individuals and organizations must organize inquiry: they select questions, interpret answers, and update beliefs in ways that determine whether decisive distinctions are identified or missed. Despite its importance, the organization of inquiry is largely absent from formal economic analysis.
This paper studies decision-making under \emph{diagnostic uncertainty}, in which agents must learn not only about payoff-relevant states, but about which questions are informative. We develop a model in which agents choose questions sequentially prior to commitment, while facing uncertainty over a latent diagnostic structure that governs how questions generate answers. Before each inquiry step, agents may incur cognitive cost to refine beliefs about this diagnostic structure. The resulting problem is a finite-horizon dynamic program over inquiry, in which costly attention is allocated to belief transformations over diagnostic structure rather than directly to payoff-relevant states.
Two canonical diagnostic geometries isolate distinct planning margins. In one, value depends on locating a decisive question; in the other, on maintaining a correct sequence of questions. Both environments admit closed-form solutions and yield a common representation in which optimal inquiry increases the probability of success relative to uninformed search.
The framework identifies a distinct margin of economic behavior—planning under diagnostic uncertainty—that becomes increasingly important in environments where answers are abundant but the organization of inquiry remains scarce.
35012.zh_abstract: 许多重要的经济决策不仅依赖于获取信息，还依赖于在承诺采取行动之前确定哪些问题值得提出。个人和组织必须组织探究：他们选择问题，解读答案，并以决定是否识别出或错过关键区分的方式更新信念。尽管其重要性，探究的组织在很大程度上缺席于正式的经济分析。

35011.title: Knowledge Spillovers and Local Outcomes: An Existence Proof from the Establishment of the National Labs
35011.zh_title: 知识溢出与地方成果：来自国家实验室建立的实证证据
35011.authors: Susan Helper, Resem Makan, Daniel W. Shoag
35011.abstract: We study the establishment of U.S. National Laboratories in the 1940s–1950s to estimate local spillovers from public research infrastructure. This setting allows us to causally identify such spillovers, for two reasons: 1) Lab sites were chosen largely for security and political reasons, rather than existing or potential innovative capability and 2) We identify runner-up locations using archival sources. We find several types of knowledge spillovers: Compared to control counties, Lab counties experience large and persistent increases in patenting by non-lab inventors; non-lab patents in the same county shift toward laboratories’ research fields and cite laboratory patents more frequently. Using newly digitized county data from 1936–1970, we find sustained increases in retail sales and household income. Linked 1940–1950 Census records show wage gains for pre-existing residents who remain in lab counties, with larger effects for college-educated workers. We find that cohorts exposed to laboratory establishment during school-age years attained more education, consistent with a human-capital channel. Spillovers arise despite extensive secrecy around early nuclear research, suggesting that co-location with public R&D can generate sizable local benefits even under restricted information flows.
35011.zh_abstract: 我们研究了20世纪40至50年代美国国家实验室的建立，以估计公共研究基础设施带来的地方溢出效应。这一设定使我们能够因果地识别此类溢出效应，原因有二：1）实验室选址在很大程度上是基于安全和政治原因，而非现有或潜在的创新能力；2）我们利用档案资料确定了备选地点。我们发现了多种类型的知识溢出效应：与对照县相比，实验室所在县的非实验室发明人的专利申请量出现了大幅且持久的增长；同一县内非实验室专利的研究领域向实验室的研究领域转变，并且更频繁地引用实验室的专利。利用1936年至1970年间新数字化的县级数据，我们发现零售额和家庭收入持续增长。1940年至1950年的关联人口普查记录显示，留在实验室县的原有居民获得了工资增长，对受过大学教育的工人的影响更大。我们发现，在学龄期暴露于实验室建立的队列获得了更多的教育，这与人力资本渠道一致。尽管早期核研究存在广泛的保密性，但溢出效应仍然出现，这表明即使在信息流动受限的情况下，与公共研发机构共处一地也能产生可观的地方收益。

35010.title: Adaptive Enforcement with AI-Augmented Monitoring
35010.zh_title: 利用人工智能增强监控的自适应执法
35010.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, D. Daniel Sokol, Liad Wagman
35010.abstract: We study a novel dynamic inspection game in which a regulator commits to a detection technology, and a regulated firm chooses whether to engage in harmful conduct and, if detected and sanctioned, whether to incur a redesign cost that generates a modified violation requiring renewed detection. In this adaptive environment, bounded sanctions give rise to three Markov perfect equilibria: full compliance, harm until recognition, and persistent redesign. We show that AI-augmented monitoring can shift the equilibrium from persistent redesign to harm until recognition, but only when regulatory investment crosses a regime-shifting threshold. Below this threshold, greater monitoring intensity may increase enforcement workload without reducing aggregate harm, as the regulator repeatedly detects adaptive violations while the firm continues to redesign. Thus, partial investments in AI monitoring can generate congestion rather than deterrence. When the firm can also adopt AI to reduce its redesign cost, the regulator’s deterrence threshold rises, reinforcing the strategic interaction between enforcement and evasion technologies. Moreover, congestion becomes particularly salient when AI-flagged violations require human review and regulatory review capacity is binding. In this case, the precision of AI triage—especially its false positive rate—matters as much as detection intensity. Enforcement effectiveness therefore depends not only on expanding detection, but also on allocating scarce human review resources efficiently.
35010.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个新颖的动态检查博弈，其中监管者承诺使用一种检测技术，而被监管的企业则选择是否从事有害行为，并且在被检测到并受到制裁后，选择是否承担重新设计成本以产生一个需要重新检测的修改后的违规行为。在这个自适应环境中，有界制裁产生了三个马尔可夫完美均衡：完全合规、直到被识别才停止危害、以及持续重新设计。我们表明，人工智能增强的监控可以将均衡从持续重新设计转变为直到被识别才停止危害，但这仅在监管投资跨越一个制度转换阈值时才能实现。低于这个阈值，更高的监控强度可能会增加执法工作量而不减少总危害，因为监管者反复检测到适应性的违规行为，而企业则继续进行重新设计。因此，对人工智能监控的部分投资可能产生拥堵而非威慑。当企业也可以采用人工智能来降低其重新设计成本时，监管者的威慑阈值会上升，从而强化了执法与规避技术之间的战略互动。此外，当人工智能标记的违规行为需要人工审查且监管审查能力有限时，拥堵问题变得尤为突出。在这种情况下，人工智能分流（triage）的精确度——尤其是其误报率——与检测强度同等重要。因此，执法有效性不仅取决于扩大检测范围，还取决于有效分配稀缺的人工审查资源。
35010.meta: Programs：IO, LE, POL；JEL：D82, K21, K42, L40

35009.title: The Effects of Fiscal News on Household Expectations and Spending: New Causal Evidence
35009.zh_title: 财政新闻对家庭预期和支出的影响：新的因果证据
35009.authors: Myungkyu Shim, Kwang Hwan Kim, Myunghwan Andrew Lee, Sangyup Choi, Siye Bae, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
35009.abstract: We provide experimental evidence on how fiscal news shapes households’ expectations and spending behavior. Using a new survey of ~11,000 Korean individuals linked to automatically collected high-frequency spending data, we elicit respondents’ fiscal and macroeconomic beliefs and randomly provide them with one of five pieces of information about current public debt levels, fiscal deficits, and the government’s plans for deficit reduction. Exogenous increases in expected future public debt raise expected inflation and increase consumer spending. On the other hand, exogenous increases in expected fiscal balance raise expected output growth and have no significant effect on consumer spending.
35009.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于财政新闻如何塑造家庭预期和支出行为的实验证据。利用一项针对约11,000名韩国个体的新调查，该调查与自动收集的高频支出数据相关联，我们引出了受访者的财政和宏观经济信念，并随机向他们提供五条信息中的一条，内容涉及当前公共债务水平、财政赤字以及政府减少赤字的计划。预期未来公共债务的外生性增加会提高预期通胀率并增加消费者支出。另一方面，预期财政平衡的外生性增加会提高预期产出增长，但对消费者支出没有显著影响。

35008.title: The Cold War and the U.S. Labor Market
35008.zh_title: 冷战与美国劳动力市场
35008.authors: Ilyana Kuziemko, Donato A. Onorato, Suresh Naidu
35008.abstract: We argue that the Cold War contributed to the inclusive growth of the post-war decades. On the labor-demand side, we isolate exogenous shifts in military procurement across states and firms. We show that military procurement increases manufacturing employment and reduces inequality. Overall, the 1950s-to-1990s decline in defense production explains roughly one-quarter of the decline in manufacturing employment and nearly one-tenth of the rise of top-ten income share. On the labor-supply side, the Cold-War-era draft removed millions of young men from the labor force, significantly reducing young male civilian unemployment. Military procurement also increased voter support for hawkish foreign policy.
35008.zh_abstract: 我们认为冷战对战后几十年的包容性增长做出了贡献。在劳动力需求方面，我们分离了各州和企业间军事采购的外生性变化。我们表明，军事采购增加了制造业就业并减少了不平等。总体而言，1950年代至1990年代国防生产的下降解释了制造业就业下降的大约四分之一，以及前10%收入份额上升的近十分之一。在劳动力供给方面，冷战时期的征兵制使数百万年轻男性退出劳动力队伍，显著降低了年轻男性平民失业率。军事采购还增加了选民对鹰派外交政策的支持。

35007.title: The Hidden Cost of Stock Market Concentration: When Funds Hit Regulatory Limits
35007.zh_title: 股市集中度的隐性成本：当基金触及监管限制时
35007.authors: Lubos Pastor, Taisiya Sikorskaya, Jinrui Wang
35007.abstract: As stock market concentration has risen, regulatory limits on fund portfolio concentration have become increasingly binding, especially for large-cap growth funds. When funds approach these limits, they trim their largest holdings and reduce equity exposure. Funds perform worse when constrained. A constraint-based ownership measure predicts stock returns, particularly among the largest firms. These findings suggest that high market concentration can distort stock prices by limiting the ability of optimistic investors to scale their positions. Just like short-sale constraints can produce overpricing by limiting pessimistic investors' views, constraints on long positions can generate underpricing by suppressing optimists' views.
35007.zh_abstract: 随着股市集中度的上升，对基金投资组合集中度的监管限制变得越来越具有约束力，尤其是对于大盘成长型基金。当基金接近这些限制时，它们会减持其最大持仓并降低股票敞口。基金在受到约束时表现更差。一种基于约束的持股度量指标可以预测股票回报，尤其是在最大的公司中。这些发现表明，高市场集中度会通过限制乐观投资者扩大其头寸的能力来扭曲股票价格。正如卖空限制可以通过限制悲观投资者的观点导致定价过高一样，对多头头寸的限制可以通过压制乐观投资者的观点导致定价过低。

35006.title: Cash Transfers and Productive Inclusion: Evidence from Bolsa Familia
35006.zh_title: 现金转移与生产性包容：来自家庭补助金的证据
35006.authors: Michael C. Best, Felipe Lobel, Valdemar Pinho Neto
35006.abstract: We study how cash transfers affect work and health. Exploiting an increase in the generosity of the world's largest cash-transfer program for the extremely poor, we show that the reform raised employment by 5 percent while sharply improving health: hospitalization fell 8 percent and mortality 14 percent, saving roughly 1,000 lives. These findings challenge the view that transfers reduce work. Instead, transfers can relax binding subsistence and health constraints, raise productivity, and expand labor supply. We formalize this mechanism in a model of productive inclusion and use it to evaluate welfare, yielding lessons for antipoverty policy design in low-income settings.
35006.zh_abstract: 我们研究现金转移如何影响工作和健康。利用世界上最大的针对极端贫困人口的现金转移计划慷慨度的增加，我们表明这项改革使就业率提高了5%，同时显著改善了健康状况：住院率下降了8%，死亡率下降了14%，挽救了大约1000条生命。这些发现挑战了转移支付会减少工作的观点。相反，转移支付可以放松具有约束力的生存和健康约束，提高生产力，并扩大劳动力供给。我们在一个生产性包容模型中形式化了这一机制，并用它来评估福利，为低收入环境下的反贫困政策设计提供了经验教训。

35005.title: Early-Life Sugar Restrictions Reduce Genetic Disparities in Adult Adiposity
35005.zh_title: 生命早期糖分限制减少了成年肥胖的遗传差异
35005.authors: Tadeja Gracner, Claire Boone, Patrick Turley, Paul Gertler
35005.abstract: Genetics confer 2–3-fold higher obesity risk through inherited mechanisms affecting appetite and metabolism, with pathways particularly modifiable during the first 1,000 days of life. We leverage the end of UK sugar rationing in September 1953, a sharp discontinuity in early-life sugar exposure by conception date, to examine whether sugar restriction mitigates genetically determined obesity risk using UK Biobank data linking an obesity polygenic index with adiposity phenotypes. Without rationing, high genetic risk individuals had triple the obesity prevalence of low-risk counterparts. Restriction through age two narrowed this disparity by 40%, operating through visceral rather than general adiposity, and was concentrated among high-risk adults with above-median adiposity levels. Early nutritional environments can alter inherited obesity trajectories, pointing to targeted early-life interventions to reduce genetically determined health inequalities.
35005.zh_abstract: 遗传学通过影响食欲和新陈代谢的遗传机制赋予2-3倍更高的肥胖风险，这些途径在生命最初的1000天内尤其可改变。我们利用1953年9月英国糖配给制的结束——这是一个根据受孕日期划分的生命早期糖分暴露的急剧不连续性——来检验糖分限制是否能减轻由基因决定的肥胖风险，使用英国生物银行数据将肥胖多基因指数与肥胖表型联系起来。在没有配给制的情况下，高遗传风险个体的肥胖患病率是低风险个体的三倍。通过两岁前的限制，这一差异缩小了40%，其作用机制是通过内脏肥胖而非全身性肥胖，并且集中在肥胖水平高于中位数的高风险成年人中。早期的营养环境可以改变遗传的肥胖轨迹，这指向了有针对性的生命早期干预措施，以减少由基因决定的健康不平等。

35004.title: Using Global Shocks to Understand the Level and Structure of Executive Compensation
35004.zh_title: 利用全球冲击理解高管薪酬的水平与结构
35004.authors: David Hummels, Jakob Munch, Huilin Zhang
35004.abstract: We build a model of CEO compensation that unites principal-agent and assignment models in the face of trade shocks that interact with CEO effort. The model predicts that trade shocks change CEO compensation through scale, volatility, and ability-magnification channels. Using Danish matched worker-firm data, we find empirical support for these channels: (1) Exogenous shocks to trade increase the size and value of the firm and CEO compensation; (2) the share of firm value paid to the CEO is increasing in the size and value of the firm and increasing in the volatility induced by global shocks; (3) Higher-ability CEOs generate increases in firm value that are more than 100 times greater than their compensation, through a combination of mitigating losses and maximizing the return to positive shocks.
35004.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个CEO薪酬模型，该模型在面对与CEO努力相互作用的贸易冲击时，统一了委托-代理模型和分配模型。该模型预测，贸易冲击通过规模、波动性和能力放大渠道改变CEO薪酬。利用丹麦匹配的工人-企业数据，我们找到了支持这些渠道的经验证据：(1) 对贸易的外生冲击增加了企业的规模和价值以及CEO薪酬；(2) 支付给CEO的企业价值份额随着企业的规模和价值的增加而增加，并且随着全球冲击引发的波动性增加而增加；(3) 能力更高的CEO通过结合减少损失和最大化正向冲击回报的方式，使企业价值的增长超过其薪酬的100倍以上。
35004.meta: Programs：CF, ITI；JEL：F16, G30, J30, J31, M52

35003.title: Salience and (Non-)Buyer's Remorse: Optimal Nonlinear Pricing with Cognitively Constrained Consumers
35003.zh_title: 显著性与（非）买家懊悔：面向认知受限消费者的最优非线性定价
35003.authors: Aaron L. Bodoh-Creed, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Ian Muir, Gregory K. Sun
35003.abstract: Nonlinear pricing theory predicts that firms can extract surplus by inducing heterogeneous consumers to self-sort across price contract offers that are ex-post optimal for them. We study subscription pricing when the frictionless sorting assumption fails. Using large-scale subscription experiments conducted by Lyft, we document systematic deviations from optimal self-selection: many high-demand consumers decline subscriptions that would have saved them money, while some subscribers fail to break even. We develop a structural model of intensive-margin demand in which consumers may exhibit salience failures, forecast errors about future demand, or impulsivity. We show that subscription uptake can be recast as one-sided noncompliance in a binary-instrument framework, allowing us to leverage LATE methods to identify counterfactual outcome distributions and a novel “uptake function” linking baseline outcomes to compliance behavior. Combining experimental price variation with this identification strategy, we recover utility primitives, demand heterogeneity, and behavioral parameters. Salience failures and forecast errors play quantitatively important roles. Counterfactual analyses show that optimal subscription pricing generates substantial gains relative to linear pricing, but these gains are highly sensitive to consumer deviations from ex-post optimal choice. Implementing nonlinear pricing therefore requires not only optimal contract design for consumer screening, but also coordinated efforts to mitigate behavioral frictions.
35003.zh_abstract: 非线性定价理论预测，企业可以通过诱导异质性消费者在事后对他们来说最优的价格合同要约中进行自我选择来提取剩余。我们研究了当无摩擦分类假设不成立时的订阅定价。利用Lyft进行的大规模订阅实验，我们记录了与最优自我选择的系统性偏离：许多高需求消费者拒绝了本可以为他们省钱的订阅，而一些订阅者未能实现收支平衡。我们开发了一个集约边际需求的结构模型，在该模型中，消费者可能表现出显著性失败、对未来需求的预测错误或冲动性。我们表明，订阅的采用可以被重新解释为二元工具变量框架中的单侧不依从，这使我们能够利用局部平均处理效应方法来识别反事实结果分布，以及一个新颖的“采用函数”，将基线结果与依从行为联系起来。将实验性价格变化与这种识别策略相结合，我们恢复了效用基础、需求异质性和行为参数。显著性失败和预测错误起着数量上重要的作用。反事实分析表明，最优订阅定价相对于线性定价产生了可观的收益，但这些收益对消费者偏离事后最优选择的行为高度敏感。因此，实施非线性定价不仅需要针对消费者筛选的最优合同设计，还需要协调努力以减轻行为摩擦。
35003.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：C14, C51, C93, D04, L4

35002.title: Networked Information and Industrial Output: Evidence from Chile’s 1972 Truckers’ Strike
35002.zh_title: 网络化信息与工业产出：来自1972年智利卡车司机罢工的证据
35002.abstract: This paper examines Cybersyn — Chile's cybernetic coordination system under Salvador Allende — during the October 1972 national truckers' strike, which cut aggregate industrial output by roughly 9 percent. Using monthly data for twenty sectors and a calibrated CES–Leontief model, I construct sector-specific counterfactuals for the trucking shock. The four government-designated priority sectors outperform their structural predictions by an average of 17 index points; the priority–non-priority differential sits at the 90th percentile of a permutation null distribution (p = 0.100). Mitigation was selective: concentrated in sectors with state-enterprise ownership, simple supply chains, and military distribution support. Where coordination needs were greatest — food and beverages — priority designation provided no measurable protection. Cybersyn was more effective at protecting the sectors it was easiest to protect than those that most needed protecting: a partial vindication and a realistic assessment of its limits.
35002.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1972年10月全国卡车司机罢工期间的Cybersyn——萨尔瓦多·阿连德领导下的智利网络化协调系统，该罢工使工业总产出减少了大约9%。利用二十个行业的月度数据和一个校准的CES-列昂惕夫模型，我为卡车运输冲击构建了特定行业的反事实。四个政府指定的优先行业的表现平均比其结构性预测高出17个指数点；优先-非优先差异位于排列零分布的第90百分位（p = 0.100）。缓解是有选择性的：集中在具有国有企业所有权、简单供应链和军事配送支持的行业。在协调需求最大的地方——食品和饮料——优先指定没有提供可衡量的保护。Cybersyn在保护最容易保护的行业方面比保护最需要保护的行业更有效：这是一种部分证实及其局限性的现实评估。
35002.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：N16, N52, N76, P26, P31, R41

35001.title: Screening with Cash Deposits in Digital Credit Markets
35001.zh_title: 数字信贷市场中的现金存款筛选机制
35001.authors: Paul Gertler, Brett Green, Catherine Wolfram
35001.abstract: We study a loan contract that requires borrowers to make a temporary cash deposit prior to disbursement, which is fully refunded and does not alter repayment incentives. In a randomized controlled trial with a digital lender, applicants are offered otherwise identical loans with or without a deposit. The deposit requirement reduces loan take-up but substantially improves repayment and lender profitability. The results indicate that deposits screen borrowers on both observable and unobservable characteristics. Higher-risk borrowers are less likely to take up deposit loans, and among borrowers with the same observable risk profile, those who accept deposit loans repay at higher rates, with the largest differences among low-risk borrowers. These findings show that simple contract features can complement data-driven credit models by adding an additional screening margin.
35001.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种贷款合同，该合同要求借款人在放款前存入一笔临时现金存款，该存款将全额退还且不会改变还款激励。在与一家数字贷款机构进行的随机对照试验中，申请人被提供除有无存款要求外完全相同的贷款。存款要求降低了贷款接受率，但显著改善了还款情况和贷款机构的盈利能力。结果表明，存款机制能够根据借款人的可观测和不可观测特征进行筛选。高风险借款人接受存款贷款的可能性较低；而在具有相同可观测风险特征的借款人中，接受存款贷款的借款人还款率更高，其中低风险借款人之间的差异最大。这些发现表明，简单的合同特征可以通过增加额外的筛选维度来补充数据驱动的信贷模型。

35000.title: Decoupling Dollar and Treasury Privilege
35000.zh_title: 美元与国债便利收益的解耦
35000.authors: Wenxin Du, Ritt Keerati, Jesse Schreger
35000.abstract: We document a strong decoupling between the convenience yield on the U.S. dollar and U.S. Treasuries. We measure the convenience of the U.S. dollar using covered interest parity (CIP) deviations between risk-free bank rates, such as secured overnight rates since the benchmark reform. In parallel, we measure the convenience of U.S. Treasury bonds through CIP deviations between government bond yields. We find a pronounced divergence between the two convenience measures in recent years: while the U.S. dollar exhibits strong convenience post-Global Financidecoupal Crisis, the U.S. Treasury convenience has not only declined substantially but has turned negative, most strongly so at medium- to long-term maturities. We argue that the relative supply of government bonds between the US and other developed markets is a key driver of the U.S. Treasury convenience compared to other government bonds. Finally, we present a simple framework with a constrained global financial intermediary to link dollar and Treasury convenience.
35000.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美元与美国国债的便利收益之间存在显著解耦。我们使用无风险银行利率（例如基准改革后的有担保隔夜利率）之间的抛补利率平价（CIP）偏差来衡量美元的便利性。同时，我们通过政府债券收益率之间的CIP偏差来衡量美国国债的便利性。我们发现，近年来这两种便利性指标出现了显著分化：尽管美元在全球金融危机后表现出强劲的便利性，但美国国债的便利性不仅大幅下降，而且转为负值，在中长期期限上尤为明显。我们认为，美国与其他发达市场之间政府债券的相对供给，是决定美国国债相对于其他政府债券便利性的关键驱动因素。最后，我们提出了一个包含受约束的全球金融中介机构的简单框架，以将美元便利性与国债便利性联系起来。

35041.title: Capital in the Capitol: Congressional Trades Resemble Uninformed Retail Trading
35041.zh_title: 国会山上的资本：国会交易类似于不知情的散户交易
35041.abstract: Do elected officials exploit informational advantages for personal financial gain? This question has attracted heightened attention amid increased scrutiny of congressional stock trading, particularly following the COVID-19 pandemic. Prior research finds little evidence that legislators outperform the market, but existing studies rely on limited time periods and offer limited insight into the mechanisms underlying trade timing. We revisit this question by constructing a novel dataset covering the stock trading activity of all U.S. members of Congress and their immediate families from 2012 to 2023. We find that, on average, legislators’ portfolios underperform or, at best, match market benchmarks after the STOCK Act. What explains this mediocre performance? We show that legislators’ positions track financial professionals’ recommendations, and that their timing largely reflects prevailing market sentiment, estimated from retail investors’ social media posts, rather than anticipating future price changes. Together, these results suggest that legislators’ observable trading behavior is more consistent with public-signal-following than with systematically profitable use of private information.
35041.zh_abstract: 民选官员是否利用信息优势谋取个人经济利益？这个问题在国会股票交易受到更严格审查的背景下引起了高度关注，尤其是在COVID-19大流行之后。先前的研究发现很少有证据表明立法者能跑赢市场，但现有研究依赖于有限的时间段，并且对交易时机背后的机制提供的见解有限。我们通过构建一个涵盖2012年至2023年所有美国国会议员及其直系亲属股票交易活动的新数据集，重新审视了这个问题。我们发现，平均而言，在《股票法案》之后，立法者的投资组合表现逊于或最多与市场基准持平。是什么导致了这种平庸的表现？我们表明，立法者的持仓追踪了金融专业人士的建议，并且他们的交易时机在很大程度上反映了从散户投资者社交媒体帖子中估计的当前市场情绪，而不是预测未来的价格变化。总之，这些结果表明，立法者可观察到的交易行为更符合跟随公开信号，而非系统性地利用私人信息获利。

35040.title: Investment-based Costs of Equity
35040.authors: Yicheng Liu, Chen Xue, Lu Zhang
35040.abstract: The q5-characteristics model estimates costs of equity as Lewellen’s (2015) out-of-sample forecasts from cross-sectional regressions. The q5-cost of equity is competitive in evaluation tests, outperforming the accounting implied cost of equity in predicting cross-sectional returns. The q5-cost of equity is precise at the industry level and aligned with average factor premiums. Its firm-level distribution is weakly left-skewed, whereas the accounting implied cost of equity is right-skewed. However, the accounting cost of equity outperforms in the time series. Factor models perform poorly in out-of-sample tests. Gradient-boosted trees improve on cross-sectional regressions, but not reliably.
35040.zh_abstract: q5特征模型通过截面回归的Lewellen（2015）样本外预测来估计股权成本。在评估测试中，q5股权成本具有竞争力，在预测截面收益方面优于会计隐含股权成本。q5股权成本在行业层面是精确的，并与平均因子溢价保持一致。其公司层面的分布呈弱左偏态，而会计隐含股权成本呈右偏态。然而，会计股权成本在时间序列上表现更优。因子模型在样本外测试中表现不佳。梯度提升树改进了截面回归，但效果不可靠。

35039.title: Measuring Organizational Capital
35039.authors: Wei Cai, Andrea Prat, Jiehang Yu
35039.abstract: Prior research has pointed to differences in organizational capital as a reason for the persistent performance discrepancies among otherwise similar firms. In this paper, we develop and validate a new measure of organizational capital. Based on over a million crowd-sourced employee reviews scraped from Glassdoor, we construct the measure of organizational capital at the firm-year level using the word embedding model and ChatGPT-generated synthetic reviews. Our measure varies over time in accordance with macro trends, and differs both across and within firms, reflecting firm heterogeneity and major internal changes. We validate our measure by testing empirical predictions of the properties of organizational capital discussed in prior literature. Our findings suggest that this measure captures a slowly evolving intangible asset that is significantly associated with firm performance and top management’s influence, aligning with the conceptualization of organizational capital by Dessein and Prat (2022). We further showcase applications of our measure in accounting, economics, finance, and management literature. Taken together, the paper provides implications for various stakeholders who are interested in assessing and managing firms’ organizational capital.
35039.zh_abstract: 先前的研究指出，组织资本的差异是导致其他方面相似的公司在绩效上持续存在差异的原因。在本文中，我们开发并验证了一种新的组织资本衡量方法。基于从Glassdoor抓取的超过一百万条众包员工评论，我们使用词嵌入模型和ChatGPT生成的合成评论，在公司-年度层面构建了组织资本衡量指标。我们的衡量指标随时间变化，与宏观趋势一致，并且在公司之间和公司内部都存在差异，反映了公司的异质性和重大内部变化。我们通过检验先前文献中讨论的组织资本属性的实证预测来验证我们的衡量指标。我们的发现表明，该衡量指标捕捉了一种缓慢演变的无形资产，该资产与公司绩效和高层管理者的影响力显著相关，这与Dessein和Prat（2022）对组织资本的概念化相一致。我们进一步展示了我们的衡量指标在会计学、经济学、金融学和管理学文献中的应用。总之，本文为有兴趣评估和管理公司组织资本的各种利益相关者提供了启示。

35038.title: Immigrants at the Margin: Labor Market Effects of the Minimum Wage
35038.zh_title: 边缘移民：最低工资的劳动力市场效应
35038.authors: Mark Borgschulte, Heepyung Cho, Darren Lubotsky
35038.abstract: We examine the differential effects of minimum wages on immigrant and native workers in the United States. We find that minimum wage increases lead to reduced hours of work among immigrants with no effect on their employment. The effects are concentrated among recently-arrived, likely-undocumented workers in high turnover industries. Native workers show no such response, even when examining native subgroups with similar characteristics to the most affected immigrants. We conclude that affected immigrant labor markets feature low-surplus, low-investment employment relationships with flexible hours, but they are embedded in labor markets where replacement is unusually costly.
35038.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国最低工资对移民和本土工人的差异化影响。我们发现，最低工资的提高导致移民的工作时间减少，但对他们的就业没有影响。这些影响集中在高流动率行业中近期抵达、可能无证件的工人身上。本土工人没有表现出这种反应，即使考察与受影响最严重的移民具有相似特征的本土子群体也是如此。我们得出结论，受影响的移民劳动力市场具有低剩余、低投资的雇佣关系，工作时间灵活，但它们嵌入在替代成本异常高昂的劳动力市场中。
35038.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：J08, J15, J38, J42, J61

35037.title: Amortized Inference for Correlated Discrete Choice Models via Equivariant Neural Networks
35037.zh_title: 通过等变神经网络对相关离散选择模型进行摊销推断
35037.authors: Easton K. Huch, Michael P. Keane
35037.abstract: Discrete choice models are fundamental tools in management science, economics, and marketing for understanding and predicting decision-making. Logit-based models are dominant in applied work, largely due to their convenient closed-form expressions for choice probabilities. However, these models entail restrictive assumptions on the stochastic utility component, constraining our ability to capture realistic and theoretically grounded choice behavior—most notably, substitution patterns. In this work, we propose an amortized inference approach using a neural network emulator to approximate choice probabilities for general error distributions, including those with correlated errors. Our proposal includes a specialized neural network architecture and accompanying training procedures designed to respect the invariance properties of discrete choice models. We provide group-theoretic foundations for the architecture, including a proof of universal approximation given a minimal set of invariant features. Once trained, the emulator enables rapid likelihood evaluation and gradient computation. We use Sobolev training, augmenting the likelihood loss with a gradient-matching penalty so that the emulator learns both choice probabilities and their derivatives. We show that emulator-based maximum likelihood estimators are consistent and asymptotically normal under mild approximation conditions, and we provide sandwich standard errors that remain valid even with imperfect likelihood approximation. Simulations show significant gains over the GHK simulator in accuracy and speed.
35037.zh_abstract: 离散选择模型是管理科学、经济学和市场营销中理解和预测决策的基本工具。基于Logit的模型在应用工作中占主导地位，这主要是由于其选择概率的便捷闭式表达式。然而，这些模型对随机效用成分施加了限制性假设，限制了我们在捕捉现实且具有理论依据的选择行为方面的能力——最显著的是替代模式。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用神经网络模拟器的摊销推断方法，以近似一般误差分布（包括具有相关误差的分布）的选择概率。我们的方案包括一个专门的神经网络架构和配套的训练程序，旨在尊重离散选择模型的等变性。我们为该架构提供了群论基础，包括在给定最小等变特征集下的通用近似证明。一旦训练完成，该模拟器能够实现快速的似然评估和梯度计算。我们使用Sobolev训练，通过梯度匹配惩罚增强似然损失，使模拟器同时学习选择概率及其导数。我们证明，在温和的近似条件下，基于模拟器的最大似然估计量是一致的且渐近正态的，并且我们提供了即使在似然近似不完美的情况下仍然有效的三明治标准误。模拟显示，在准确性和速度方面，该方法显著优于GHK模拟器。
35037.meta: Programs：TWP；JEL：C10, C13, C15, C25, C35, C45

35036.title: How AI Aggregation Affects Knowledge
35036.zh_title: 人工智能聚合如何影响知识
35036.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Tianyi Lin, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
35036.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) changes social learning when aggregated outputs become training data for future predictions. To study this, we extend the DeGroot model by introducing an AI aggregator that trains on population beliefs and feeds synthesized signals back to agents. We define the learning gap as the deviation of long-run beliefs from the efficient benchmark, allowing us to capture how AI aggregation affects learning. Our main result identifies a threshold in the speed of updating: when the aggregator updates too quickly, there is no positive-measure set of training weights that robustly improves learning across a broad class of environments, whereas such weights exist when updating is sufficiently slow. We then compare global and local architectures. Local aggregators trained on proximate or topic-specific data robustly improve learning in all environments. Consequently, replacing specialized local aggregators with a single global aggregator worsens learning in at least one dimension of the state.
35036.zh_abstract: 当聚合输出成为未来预测的训练数据时，人工智能会改变社会学习。为了研究这一点，我们扩展了DeGroot模型，引入了一个人工智能聚合器，该聚合器在总体信念上进行训练，并将合成信号反馈给代理人。我们将学习差距定义为长期信念与有效基准的偏差，从而能够捕捉人工智能聚合如何影响学习。我们的主要结果确定了更新速度的一个阈值：当聚合器更新过快时，不存在一组正测度的训练权重能够在广泛的环境类别中稳健地改善学习，而当更新足够慢时，这样的权重存在。然后，我们比较了全局架构和局部架构。基于邻近或主题特定数据训练的局部聚合器能够在所有环境中稳健地改善学习。因此，用单一的全局聚合器取代专门的局部聚合器会至少在一个状态维度上恶化学习。

35035.title: Liquidity-Driven Growth Cycles in Small Open Economies
35035.zh_title: 小型开放经济中的流动性驱动增长周期
35035.authors: Jess Benhabib, Feng Dong, Pengfei Wang, Zhenyang Xu
35035.abstract: While standard sudden-stop models explain well the sharpness of financial crises, it remains challenging to account for the persistent growth stagnation that typically follows credit-driven capital account liberalizations in emerging markets. This paper presents a small open economy model with endogenous growth and borrowing constraints to ex- plain this phenomenon. The model highlights a valuation optimistic growth expectations, fueled by foreign credit with perfectly elastic supply, raise asset prices and relax liquidity constraints, inducing investment that validates the initial optimism. This positive feed- back loop generates multiple balanced growth paths and self-fulfilling cycles. However, in closed economies or with only FDI inflows, funding supply for investment is limited by consumption smoothing, dampening this feedback and leading to a unique growth path. Belief-driven regime switches can replicate crisis dynamics, including sharp drops in asset prices and growth. The framework also exhibits periodic orbits, producing endogenous deterministic fluctuations under perfect foresight. Countercyclical macroprudential measures can disrupt the detrimental feedback loop, while policies prioritizing FDI over credit prevent bad equilibria altogether, guiding the economy toward a stable, high-growth trajectory.
35035.zh_abstract: 虽然标准的突然停止模型很好地解释了金融危机的剧烈性，但解释新兴市场通常由信贷驱动的资本账户自由化之后持续的增长停滞仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一个具有内生增长和借贷约束的小型开放经济模型来解释这一现象。该模型强调了一种估值乐观的增长预期：由具有完全弹性供给的外国信贷推动，乐观的增长预期提高了资产价格并放松了流动性约束，从而诱导投资，验证了最初的乐观情绪。这种正反馈循环产生了多个平衡增长路径和自我实现的周期。然而，在封闭经济或仅有外商直接投资流入的情况下，投资的资金供给受到消费平滑的限制，削弱了这种反馈，导致唯一的增长路径。信念驱动的体制转换可以复制危机动态，包括资产价格和增长的急剧下降。该框架还表现出周期轨道，在完美预见下产生内生确定性波动。逆周期的宏观审慎措施可以打破有害的反馈循环，而优先考虑外商直接投资而非信贷的政策则完全阻止了坏均衡，引导经济走向稳定、高增长的轨迹。

35034.title: Thinking versus Doing: Cognitive Capacity, Decision Making and Medical Diagnosis
35034.zh_title: 思考与行动：认知能力、决策制定与医疗诊断
35034.authors: Benjamin R. Handel, Louis-Jonas Heizlsperger, Jonas Knecht, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Ulrike Malmendier, Filip Matějka
35034.abstract: We study how situational fluctuations in cognitive capacity shape behavior in high-stakes, real-time decision-making. Drawing on recent advances in behavioral economics that revolve around inattention, cognition and complexity, we show that cognitive load influences how physicians in emergency departments allocate mental effort and attention when making diagnostic and treatment decisions. We use quasi-random variation in patient-physician pairings, along with granular electronic medical record and audit-log data from many clinical interactions, to show that, under higher cognitive load, physicians substitute mental deliberation with more numerous but less precise diagnostic actions. Specifically, we document that higher load (i) increases the total number of orders of diagnostic tests (ii) reduces the use of targeted, but more uncommon tests (iii) increases the use of common tests and (iv) increases uncertainty in diagnostic beliefs. Cognitive load impacts downstream inpatient admission from the emergency department: a physician in the highest cognitive load decile increases admissions by 28% relative to the same physician in the lowest cognitive load decile, for the exact same kind of patient. These results offer novel field-based evidence on the dynamics of attention and belief formation, and shed light on how cognitive constraints shape diagnostic behavior in complex, real-world environments.
35034.zh_abstract: 我们研究了认知能力的情境波动如何影响高风险、实时决策中的行为。借鉴行为经济学中围绕注意力不集中、认知和复杂性的最新进展，我们表明认知负荷会影响急诊科医生在做出诊断和治疗决策时如何分配脑力劳动和注意力。我们利用患者-医生配对的准随机变异，以及来自许多临床互动的细粒度电子病历和审计日志数据，来证明在更高的认知负荷下，医生会用数量更多但精确度更低的诊断行动来替代脑力思考。具体来说，我们记录了更高的负荷（i）增加了诊断测试的总订单数量，（ii）减少了针对性更强但不太常见的测试的使用，（iii）增加了常见测试的使用，以及（iv）增加了诊断信念的不确定性。认知负荷影响从急诊科到住院部的下游入院：与同一医生在最低认知负荷十分位数时相比，最高认知负荷十分位数的医生对完全相同类型的患者的入院率增加了28%。这些结果提供了关于注意力动态和信念形成的新颖实地证据，并揭示了认知约束如何在复杂的现实环境中塑造诊断行为。
35034.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS, PR；JEL：D83, D91, I11

35033.title: Real Effects of Nominal Interest Rates
35033.authors: Joshua K. Hausman, John V. Leahy, John Mondragon, Johannes Wieland
35033.abstract: Nominal interest rates have real effects. Residential mortgages and other real world debt contracts require a sequence of constant nominal payments. Combined with payment-to-income constraints, these nominal payments force borrowers to take on less debt when nominal interest rates rise, regardless of the behavior of the real interest rate. Survey data shows that conditional on the real rate, higher nominal mortgage interest rates reduce home buying sentiment. And increases in nominal mortgage rates reduce mortgage origination more in cities where payment-to-income constraints are more likely to bind. We explore the macroeconomic implications of payment-to-income constraints in a new Keynesian model modified to include a credit good. The payment-to-income constraint amplifies the effect of current short-term nominal interest rates on output and inflation, making the model less forward-looking than the standard new Keynesian model.
35033.zh_abstract: 名义利率具有实际效应。住房抵押贷款和其他现实世界的债务合同要求一系列固定的名义支付。结合还款收入比约束，这些名义支付迫使借款人在名义利率上升时承担更少的债务，无论实际利率的行为如何。调查数据显示，在给定实际利率的条件下，较高的名义抵押贷款利率会降低购房情绪。而名义抵押贷款利率的增加在还款收入比约束更可能起作用的城市中，会更多地减少抵押贷款发放。我们在一个修改后包含信贷商品的新凯恩斯模型中探讨了还款收入比约束的宏观经济含义。还款收入比约束放大了当前短期名义利率对产出和通胀的影响，使得该模型比标准的新凯恩斯模型更不具前瞻性。

35032.title: Skill Formation, Child Labor, and the Schooling Consequences of the World War I Agricultural Boom
35032.zh_title: 技能形成、童工与一战农业繁荣的入学后果
35032.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Carl T. Kitchens, Luke P. Rodgers
35032.abstract: We examine how the World War I agricultural commodity price boom affected human capital accumulation during the early decades of the high school movement in the United States. First, based on newly collected county-level enrollment data, we show that enrollment and average daily attendance fell sharply at the peak of the boom. Second, using linked census data between 1910 and 1940, we find that greater exposure during teenage years reduced completed schooling by 0.27 to 0.47 years, with the largest effects concentrated in high school. For younger children, the net effect of increased household resources depends on local child labor intensity: the positive effect of higher parental income on completed schooling is offset in counties where child labor was prevalent. Our results are consistent with dynamic complementarities in skill formation whose effects on lifetime schooling are mediated by the opportunity cost of child labor.
35032.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一战农产品价格繁荣如何影响美国高中运动早期几十年间的人力资本积累。首先，基于新收集的县级入学数据，我们发现入学率和平均每日出勤率在繁荣高峰期急剧下降。其次，利用1910年至1940年间的关联人口普查数据，我们发现青少年时期受到更大影响使完成学业年限减少了0.27至0.47年，其中最大的影响集中在高中阶段。对于年龄较小的儿童，家庭资源增加的净效应取决于当地童工强度：在童工盛行的县，父母收入提高对完成学业的正面影响被抵消。我们的结果与技能形成中的动态互补性一致，这种互补性对终身教育的影响受到童工机会成本的调节。
35032.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：E24, E32, J13, J24, N30

35031.title: Adversarial Selection
35031.authors: Alma Cohen, Alon Klement, Zvika Neeman, Eilon Solan
35031.abstract: In many institutional settings, k items are selected with the goal of representing the underlying distribution of claims, opinions, or characteristics in a large population. We study environments with two adversarial parties whose preferences over the selected items are commonly known and opposed. We propose the Quantile Mechanism: one party partitions the population into k disjoint subsets, and the other selects one item from each subset. We show that this procedure is optimally representative among all feasible mechanisms, and illustrate its use in jury selection, multi-district litigation, and committee formation.
35031.zh_abstract: 在许多制度环境中，选择k个项目旨在代表大量人口中主张、意见或特征的潜在分布。我们研究有两个对抗方且其项目偏好已知且对立的环境。我们提出分位数机制：一方将人口划分为k个不相交的子集，另一方从每个子集中选择一个项目。我们证明，在所有可行机制中，该程序具有最优的代表性，并说明其在陪审团选择、多地区诉讼和委员会组建中的应用。
35031.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C7, D7, D82, K4

35030.title: A Gender Quota for Top Executives: Diversity without Disruption
35030.zh_title: 高管层性别配额：无破坏的多样性
35030.authors: David A. Matsa, Amalia R. Miller
35030.abstract: We study Germany’s landmark quota requiring major public companies to include at least one woman on their top executive teams. The quota increased female representation among top executives by about two-thirds. Firms largely recruited women from outside their networks and without prior public-company top-executive experience, choosing them over male candidates with similar profiles. Most were appointed to HR or niche roles, and there was no increase in female CEOs. We find no significant effects on the female share of managers in lower ranks, policies promoting gender equality, firm value, or performance. Overall, the quota boosted diversity without causing much disruption.
35030.zh_abstract: 我们研究了德国具有里程碑意义的配额制度，该制度要求大型上市公司的高管团队中至少包括一名女性。该配额使高管层中的女性比例提高了约三分之二。企业主要从自身网络之外招募女性，且这些女性此前没有上市公司高管经验，企业选择她们而非具有类似背景的男性候选人。大多数女性被任命为人力资源或利基职位，女性首席执行官的数量没有增加。我们发现，该配额对较低层级管理层的女性比例、促进性别平等的政策、企业价值或绩效没有显著影响。总体而言，该配额在未造成太多破坏的情况下提升了多样性。
35030.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS；JEL：G34, G38, J44, J71, J78, K22, K31, M51

35029.title: Climate Change, Deforestation, and the Expansion of the Global Agricultural Frontier
35029.zh_title: 气候变化、森林砍伐与全球农业边疆的扩张
35029.authors: Allan Hsiao, Jacob Moscona, Benjamin A. Olken, Karthik A. Sastry
35029.abstract: This paper studies how global warming affects deforestation and agricultural land use. Using high-resolution satellite data on global temperature, deforestation, and land cover from 2001 to 2019, we find that extreme heat shocks to agricultural productivity cause large and persistent forest loss on the world’s agricultural frontier. This effect is strongest in the tropics, in areas growing the most temperature-sensitive crops, and in regions with the most inelastic demand for agricultural products, and it does not seem to be offset by international spillovers. Moreover, we show that deforestation in response to extreme heat can be explained almost entirely by cropland expansion. We corroborate these findings using agricultural census data from Brazil, where we find evidence for a mechanism whereby heat reduces yields and raises local agricultural prices, driving cropland expansion but little land use or input adjustment along other margins. Our estimates imply that extreme heat has driven substantial forest loss and that projected warming through 2100 could lead to an additional 28 million hectares of deforestation. Our findings challenge the view that reallocation will soften the environmental consequences of climate change, suggesting instead that farmers double down and expand cropland locally when productivity falls.
35029.zh_abstract: 本文研究全球变暖如何影响森林砍伐和农业用地。利用2001年至2019年全球温度、森林砍伐和土地覆盖的高分辨率卫星数据，我们发现农业生产力遭受极端热冲击会导致全球农业边疆出现大规模且持久的森林损失。这种效应在热带地区、种植对温度最敏感作物的地区以及农产品需求最缺乏弹性的地区最为强烈，且似乎未被国际溢出效应所抵消。此外，我们表明，对极端热量的森林砍伐反应几乎完全可以由耕地扩张来解释。我们利用巴西的农业普查数据证实了这些发现，并找到了一个机制的证据：热量降低产量并提高当地农产品价格，从而推动耕地扩张，但在其他方面几乎没有土地利用或投入调整。我们的估计表明，极端热量已导致大量森林损失，而到2100年预计的变暖可能导致额外2800万公顷的森林砍伐。我们的发现挑战了重新分配将缓解气候变化环境后果的观点，反而表明当生产力下降时，农民会加倍努力并在当地扩大耕地。
35029.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：O13, Q15, Q23, Q24, Q54, Q56

35028.title: Which U.S. States Suffered a Greater Great Depression and Why?
35028.zh_title: 哪些美国州遭受了更严重的大萧条及其原因？
35028.authors: Dong Cheng, Mario J. Crucini, Hanjo T. Kim
35028.abstract: Aggregate real U.S. GDP fell by roughly 26 percent between 1929 and 1932, yet the severity of the Great Depression varied dramatically across states: CPI-deflated income per capita declined by 15 percent in Maryland but by 48 percent in South Dakota. To analyze this heterogeneity, we digitize Slaughter’s (1937) panel of state-by-sector production income for all 48 U.S. states and construct a novel set of sector- and state-specific deflators, allowing us to separate movements in physical quantities produced from the large relative price changes that occurred during the Great Depression. We then discipline a three-sector, 48-region dynamic spatial stochastic general equilibrium model and recover sequences of sector-state productivity shocks that exactly reproduce the observed sector-state quantity paths. The choice of deflators proves central, as correct deflation shifts the aggregate contraction away from agriculture and toward manufacturing while preserving idiosyncratic income variation across agricultural-dependent states. We further show that narratives based on common or even sector-specific shocks are inconsistent with the observed evolutions of state-level quantities and relative prices. Explaining the geography of the Great Depression therefore requires a high-dimensional sector-state shock structure.
35028.zh_abstract: 1929年至1932年间，美国实际国内生产总值总量下降了约26%，但大萧条的严重程度在各州之间差异巨大：马里兰州经消费者价格指数平减的人均收入下降了15%，而南达科他州下降了48%。为分析这种异质性，我们将Slaughter（1937）所有48个州的按部门生产收入面板数据数字化，并构建了一套新的按部门和州特定的平减指数，使我们能够将实际生产数量的变动与大萧条期间发生的巨大相对价格变化分离开来。然后，我们约束一个三部门、48区域的动态空间随机一般均衡模型，并恢复出完全再现观察到的部门-州数量路径的部门-州生产率冲击序列。平减指数的选择至关重要，因为正确的平减将总体收缩从农业转向制造业，同时保留了农业依赖州之间特有的收入差异。我们进一步表明，基于共同冲击甚至部门特定冲击的叙事与观察到的州级数量和相对价格的演变不一致。因此，解释大萧条的地理分布需要高维度的部门-州冲击结构。
35028.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM；JEL：E32, F44, N12, R13

35027.title: Subjective Earnings and Employment Dynamics
35027.authors: Manuel Arellano, Orazio Attanasio, Margherita Borella, Mariacristina De Nardi, Gonzalo Paz-Pardo
35027.abstract: We develop a new approach to estimating earnings, job, and employment dynamics using subjective expectations data from the NY Fed Survey of Consumer Expectations. These data provide beliefs about future earnings offers and acceptance probabilities, offering direct information on counterfactual outcomes and enabling identification under weaker assumptions. Our framework avoids biases from selection and unobserved heterogeneity that affect models using realized outcomes. First-step fixed-effects regressions identify risk, persistence, and transition effects; second-step GMM recovers the covariance structure of unobserved heterogeneities such as ability, mobility, and match quality. We find lower risk and persistence of the individual productivity component than in prior work, but greater heterogeneity in ability and match quality. Simulations show that reduced-form estimates overstate persistence and volatility on individual-level productivity due to job transitions and sorting. After accounting for heterogeneity, volatility declines and becomes flat across the earnings distribution. These results underscore the value of expectations data.
35027.zh_abstract: 我们利用纽约联邦储备银行消费者预期调查的主观预期数据，开发了一种估计收入、工作和就业动态的新方法。这些数据提供了关于未来收入报价和接受概率的信念，直接提供了反事实结果的信息，并能在更弱的假设下进行识别。我们的框架避免了使用实现结果的模型中因选择和未观测异质性而产生的偏差。第一步的固定效应回归识别了风险、持续性和转换效应；第二步的广义矩估计恢复了未观测异质性（如能力、流动性和匹配质量）的协方差结构。我们发现个体生产力成分的风险和持续性低于先前研究，但能力和匹配质量的异质性更大。模拟表明，简化形式估计因工作转换和分类而夸大了个体层面生产力的持续性和波动性。在考虑异质性后，波动性下降并在收入分布中变得平坦。这些结果凸显了预期数据的价值。
35027.meta: Programs：LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C23, C8, D15, J01

35026.title: How Responsive are Durables Expenditures to Transitory Income Shocks?
35026.zh_title: 耐用品支出对暂时性收入冲击的响应程度如何？
35026.abstract: We estimate how expenditures on durable goods respond to transitory income shocks using variation from the Economic Stimulus Act of 2008. The estimated responses are large: Households spent about 80 percent of their stimulus payment within three months of receiving the income transfer on durables alone. Most of this spending was on motor vehicles, either financed, used, or both, and about 20 percent of the total durables response was on smaller items. To purchase motor vehicles the average household levered up by 40 cents on the dollar using vehicle loans. Our findings suggest that durable goods and their financing are key to understanding the link between current income and spending.
35026.zh_abstract: 我们利用2008年《经济刺激法案》带来的变化，估计了耐用品支出如何响应暂时性收入冲击。估计的响应很大：家庭在收到收入转移后的三个月内，仅耐用品一项就花费了约80%的刺激款项。大部分支出用于机动车，无论是融资购买、二手车还是两者兼有，而耐用品总响应中约20%用于较小物品。为购买机动车，平均家庭利用汽车贷款每美元杠杆了40美分。我们的发现表明，耐用品及其融资是理解当前收入与支出之间联系的关键。

35025.title: Pharmaceutical Advertising in Dynamic Equilibrium
35025.zh_title: 动态均衡中的药品广告
35025.abstract: Direct-to-consumer advertising (DTCA) of prescription drugs may expand treatment access but also risks promoting overuse and business stealing without generating welfare gains. Among developed nations, only the United States and New Zealand permit DTCA, whereas detailing - promotion aimed at prescribers - is widely practiced. This paper analyzes the impact of DTCA on profits by modeling a counterfactual environment in which DTCA is banned. This is implemented through a dynamic equilibrium framework that adapts the Experience-Based Equilibrium (Fershtman and Pakes, 2012) for empirical analysis. EBE incorporates constraints on the cognitive abilities of decision-makers and mitigates researchers’ computational concerns. Using data from four therapeutic markets, we first validate the EBE’s ability to replicate observed advertising patterns, then simulate counterfactual DTCA bans. Both the data and our empirical work indicate that DTCA and detailing are strong complements in generating current profits, and our results illuminate the need to account for this when evaluating the ban. The ban leads firms to reduce detailing and has a negative effect on profits in all markets, but the magnitude of the effect varies from under 5% in the market for Ulcer to 27.5% for Asthma medications.
35025.zh_abstract: 处方药直接面向消费者广告可能扩大治疗可及性，但也存在促进过度使用和业务窃取而不产生福利收益的风险。在发达国家中，只有美国和新西兰允许直接面向消费者广告，而面向处方者的推广——即“详细说明”——则被广泛实践。本文通过模拟直接面向消费者广告被禁止的反事实环境，分析其对利润的影响。这是通过一个动态均衡框架实现的，该框架将基于经验的均衡（Fershtman and Pakes, 2012）应用于实证分析。基于经验的均衡纳入了决策者认知能力的约束，并减轻了研究者的计算问题。利用四个治疗市场的数据，我们首先验证了基于经验的均衡复制观察到的广告模式的能力，然后模拟了反事实的直接面向消费者广告禁令。数据和我们的实证工作都表明，直接面向消费者广告和详细说明在产生当前利润方面是强互补品，我们的结果阐明了在评估禁令时需要考虑这一点。禁令导致企业减少详细说明，并对所有市场的利润产生负面影响，但影响幅度从溃疡药物市场低于5%到哮喘药物市场的27.5%不等。

35024.title: Learning How To Borrow in a Fintech World: Consumer Behavior When Search Costs Are (Near) Zero
35024.zh_title: 在金融科技世界中学习如何借贷：搜索成本（近乎）为零时的消费者行为
35024.abstract: Online loan marketplaces are changing consumer lending. Here we investigate consumer behavior in these markets with near-zero search costs. Using administrative data on 730,000 applications, 750,000 offers, and 200,000 individuals, together with credit registry records, we document four facts. First, substantial within-applicant dispersion in offered terms makes search highly valuable. Second, marketplace nudges mitigate choice complexity. Third, applicants search significantly, applying repeatedly, asking for different terms, and rejecting offers, in ways consistent with their creditworthiness. Fourth, dynamic adverse selection constrains search, as lenders penalize repeat applicants. Our findings highlight trade-offs between informational gains from search, and reputational and cognitive costs.
35024.zh_abstract: 在线贷款市场正在改变消费贷款。本文研究了搜索成本近乎为零的这类市场中的消费者行为。利用包含73万份申请、75万份报价和20万个个体的行政数据，并结合信用登记记录，我们记录了四个事实。第一，同一申请人收到的报价条件存在显著差异，这使得搜索极具价值。第二，市场平台的助推措施减轻了选择的复杂性。第三，申请人会进行大量搜索，反复申请、要求不同条件并拒绝报价，其行为方式与其信用状况相符。第四，动态逆向选择限制了搜索，因为贷方会惩罚重复申请人。我们的研究结果凸显了搜索带来的信息收益与声誉成本和认知成本之间的权衡。

35023.title: Tariffs, Global Value Chains, and the Incidence of Protection: Evidence from US Automobiles
35023.zh_title: 关税、全球价值链与保护主义的影响：来自美国汽车业的证据
35023.authors: Luke Heeney, Christopher R. Knittel, Jasdeep Mandia
35023.abstract: In many modern industries, firms compete in differentiated-product markets while relying on complex global value chains for intermediate inputs. In such settings, trade policies such as tariffs on vehicles and parts operate not only through consumer substitution and firm pricing, but also through firms’ cost structures and sourcing decisions. We develop a structural model of the U.S. automobile market that integrates random-coefficients demand, multiproduct firm pricing, and a flexible supply-side framework in which shocks to the cost of imported parts transmit imperfectly into manufacturers’ marginal costs. The model is disciplined by novel model-level data on imported-parts exposure and exploits exchange-rate variation to identify cost pass-through. Our counterfactual analysis quantifies the effects of alternative tariff policies on prices, profits, and welfare. First, tariffs on imported vehicles alone reallocate demand toward domestically assembled products and increase U.S. producer surplus, generating a gain of approximately $\$1$ billion for U.S.-headquartered firms, while reducing consumer surplus by about $\$14$ billion. Second, extending tariffs to imported intermediate inputs fundamentally alters these effects: consumer surplus losses roughly double, and producer surplus for U.S.-headquartered firms declines by about $\$2.6$ billion. These aggregate effects mask substantial heterogeneity: firms with greater exposure to imported parts experience losses, whereas those relying more on domestic inputs are better able to increase profits. Overall, the results show that tariff incidence depends critically on firms’ exposure to global value chains and cannot be inferred from final assembly locations alone.
35023.zh_abstract: 在许多现代产业中，企业在差异化产品市场上竞争，同时依赖复杂的全球价值链获取中间投入。在此背景下，对车辆和零部件征收关税等贸易政策不仅通过消费者替代和企业定价发挥作用，还通过企业的成本结构和采购决策产生影响。我们构建了一个美国汽车市场的结构模型，该模型整合了随机系数需求、多产品企业定价以及一个灵活的供给侧框架，在该框架中，进口零部件成本冲击会不完全地传导至制造商的边际成本。该模型受到新颖的模型层面进口零部件敞口数据的约束，并利用汇率变动来识别成本传导。我们的反事实分析量化了替代性关税政策对价格、利润和福利的影响。首先，仅对进口车辆征收关税会将需求重新分配给国内组装的产品，并增加美国生产者剩余，为美国总部企业带来约10亿美元的收益，同时使消费者剩余减少约140亿美元。其次，将关税扩展到进口中间投入品会从根本上改变这些影响：消费者剩余损失大约翻倍，美国总部企业的生产者剩余下降约26亿美元。这些总体效应掩盖了显著的异质性：对进口零部件敞口较大的企业遭受损失，而更依赖国内投入的企业则更能增加利润。总体而言，结果表明关税的影响关键取决于企业对全球价值链的敞口，不能仅从最终组装地点推断。

35022.title: AI Patents in the United States and China: Measurement, Organization, and Knowledge Flows
35022.zh_title: 美国与中国的AI专利：测度、组织与知识流动
35022.authors: Hanming Fang, Xian Gu, Hanyin Yan, Wu Zhu
35022.abstract: We develop a high-precision classifier to measure artificial intelligence (AI) patents by fine-tuning PatentSBERTa on manually labeled data from the USPTO’s AI Patent Dataset. Our classifier substantially improves the existing USPTO approach, achieving 97.0% precision, 91.3% recall, and a 94.0% F1 score, and it generalizes well to Chinese patents based on citation and lexical validation. Applying it to granted U.S. patents (1976–2023) and Chinese patents (2010–2023), we document rapid growth in AI patenting in both countries and broad convergence in AI patenting intensity and subfield composition, even as China surpasses the United States in recent annual patent counts. The organization of AI innovation nevertheless differs sharply: U.S. AI patenting is concentrated among large private incumbents and established hubs, whereas Chinese AI patenting is more geographically diffuse and institutionally diverse, with larger roles for universities and state-owned enterprises. For listed firms, AI patents command a robust market-value premium in both countries. Cross-border citations show continued technological interdependence rather than decoupling, with Chinese AI inventors relying more heavily on U.S. frontier knowledge than vice versa.
35022.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个高精度分类器来测度人工智能（AI）专利，方法是在美国专利商标局（USPTO）AI专利数据集的人工标注数据上对PatentSBERTa进行微调。我们的分类器显著改进了现有的USPTO方法，实现了97.0%的精确率、91.3%的召回率和94.0%的F1分数，并且基于引文和词汇验证，该分类器能很好地泛化到中国专利。将其应用于已授权的美国专利（1976-2023年）和中国专利（2010-2023年），我们记录了两国AI专利的快速增长，以及AI专利密度和子领域构成的广泛趋同，即使中国在近年的年度专利数量上超过了美国。然而，AI创新的组织方式存在显著差异：美国AI专利集中在大型私营在位企业和成熟中心，而中国AI专利在地理上更分散、在制度上更多元，大学和国有企业的角色更为突出。对于上市公司而言，AI专利在两国都带来了强劲的市场价值溢价。跨境引文显示的是持续的技术相互依存而非脱钩，中国AI发明家对美国前沿知识的依赖程度高于美国对中国知识的依赖。
35022.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：C55, G14, O31, O33, O34, O57

35021.title: The Empathy Channel in Fertility
35021.abstract: Being around babies makes people want babies. We formalize this observation as the empathy channel: exposure to infants in the social environment activates neurobiological mechanisms that increase the desire for parenthood. As children become scarcer, this affective stimulus weakens, further eroding the motivation to have children. We embed the mechanism in a two-group overlapping-generations quantity-quality model. The empathy channel generates a positive externality, since each birth raises others’ desire for children, making the decentralized equilibrium inefficient. We characterize the optimal per-child subsidy and show that the first-order Pigouvian rate substantially overshoots the general-equilibrium optimum. The optimal targeting rule follows a Ramsey-like logic, directing the subsidy at the group with the most externality per fiscal dollar, not the group with the largest externality per child. The calibrated model suggests that the empathy channel can account for 3–33% of the fertility decline, with 13.4% at the baseline. At this baseline, the Pigouvian overshoot is 23–32% and the optimal subsidy raises welfare by 0.22% in consumption-equivalent terms.
35021.zh_abstract: 身边有婴儿会让人想要孩子。我们将这一观察形式化为共情渠道：在社会环境中接触婴儿会激活神经生物学机制，从而增加为人父母的愿望。随着孩子变得越来越稀缺，这种情感刺激会减弱，进一步削弱生育动机。我们将这一机制嵌入一个两组群重叠世代数量-质量模型中。共情渠道产生正外部性，因为每一次生育都会提高他人对孩子的渴望，使得分散均衡无效率。我们刻画了最优的每个孩子补贴，并表明一阶庇古税率会大幅超过一般均衡最优值。最优目标规则遵循类似拉姆齐的逻辑，将补贴导向每财政美元产生最大外部性的组群，而非每个孩子产生最大外部性的组群。校准后的模型表明，共情渠道可以解释3-33%的生育率下降，基线值为13.4%。在此基线值下，庇古超额为23-32%，最优补贴以消费等价计算使福利提高0.22%。

35020.title: Why Do Americans No Longer Work So Much More Than Non-Americans?
35020.zh_title: 为什么美国人不再比非美国人工作多那么多？
35020.authors: Serdar Birinci, Loukas Karabarbounis, Kurt See
35020.abstract: In the 1990s, Americans used to work much more than non-Americans. Nowadays, about half of the gap in hours worked has reversed. To evaluate the convergence of working hours, we develop a tractable model of labor supply enriched with multiple sources of heterogeneity across individuals, an extensive margin of participation, multi-member households, and an elaborate system of taxes and benefits upon non-employment. Using detailed measurements from micro-level and aggregate datasets, we identify model parameters and sources of heterogeneity across individuals for various countries. We run a horse race between competing explanations and find that U.S. hours per person declined after 2000 owing mainly to the rise of government health benefits provided to the non-employed. Non-U.S. countries have generous benefits for the non-employed, but this generosity has not changed as much over time as in the United States, and public health coverage does not depend on employment status or income levels. For these countries, the rise of labor supply is generally accounted for by a mix of factors, such as the rise of wages and the falling disutility of work.
35020.zh_abstract: 在1990年代，美国人过去比非美国人工作多得多。如今，工作时间差距大约有一半已经逆转。为了评估工作时间的趋同，我们开发了一个易于处理的劳动供给模型，该模型融入了个体间的多种异质性来源、参与决策的广延边际、多成员家庭以及针对非就业状态的复杂税收和福利体系。利用来自微观层面和总体数据集的详细测量，我们识别了不同国家个体间的模型参数和异质性来源。我们对相互竞争的解释进行了赛马分析，发现2000年后美国人均工作时间下降主要是由于向非就业者提供的政府健康福利增加。非美国国家为非就业者提供了慷慨的福利，但这种慷慨程度随时间的变化不如美国那么大，并且公共健康覆盖不依赖于就业状态或收入水平。对于这些国家，劳动供给的增加通常由多种因素共同解释，例如工资上涨和工作负效用的下降。
35020.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E60, H53, J22

35019.title: Can Personal Access to Medical Expertise Overcome Vaccine Hesitancy?
35019.zh_title: 个人接触医学专业知识能否克服疫苗犹豫？
35019.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Ron Diris, Raymond Montizaan, Daniel I. Rees
35019.abstract: Using data on applicants to Dutch medical schools and their older relatives (i.e., parents, aunts, and uncles ages 60+), we estimate the effect of personal access to medical expertise on vaccine hesitancy. Leveraging variation in lottery outcomes that determine admission to medical schools, we find that having a physician in the family increases the likelihood of complying with government recommendations that anyone over the age of 59 receive a second booster dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. Our estimated effects are strongest for having a female physician in the family, suggesting important gender-based differences in how medical expertise is communicated.
35019.zh_abstract: 利用荷兰医学院申请者及其年长亲属（即60岁以上的父母、姑姨和叔舅）的数据，我们估计了个人接触医学专业知识对疫苗犹豫的影响。利用决定医学院录取的抽签结果的变化，我们发现，家中有医生会增加遵循政府建议（即所有59岁以上人群接种第二剂COVID-19疫苗加强针）的可能性。我们估计的影响在家中有女医生时最为显著，这表明医学专业知识的沟通方式存在重要的性别差异。

35074.title: When Does Acquisition Integration Succeed? Evidence from Inside the Integration Black Box
35074.zh_title: 收购整合何时成功？来自整合黑箱内部的证据
35074.authors: Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
35074.abstract: We penetrate the black box of post-acquisition integration by examining whether business unit leaders (BULs)—executives responsible for integrating and operating acquired targets—shape integration outcomes. Using natural language processing-based measures of realized integration outcomes and financial metrics, we find that BULs’ target-industry experience increases (decreases) integration success (failures) through superior realization of transaction synergies. Other BUL attributes are unrelated to integration outcomes. Consistent with the importance of integration for acquisition success, such experience enhances acquisition performance. BULs’ target-industry experience improves integration planning and their post-acquisition career outcomes but is unrelated to earlier stages of the acquisition process.
35074.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察业务部门负责人——负责整合和运营收购目标的执行官——是否影响整合结果，来深入探究收购后整合的黑箱。利用基于自然语言处理的已实现整合结果度量和财务指标，我们发现，业务部门负责人的目标行业经验通过更好地实现交易协同效应，提高了整合成功（减少了失败）。业务部门负责人的其他属性与整合结果无关。与整合对收购成功的重要性相一致，这种经验提升了收购绩效。业务部门负责人的目标行业经验改善了整合规划及其收购后的职业结果，但与收购过程的早期阶段无关。

35073.title: Understanding Support for Cost-Ineffective Environmental Policy Instruments
35073.zh_title: 理解对低效环境政策工具的支持
35073.authors: Chenxi Jiang, Maximiliano Lauletta, Ro’ee Levy, Joseph S. Shapiro, Dmitry Taubinsky
35073.abstract: Many governments use environmental standards rather than more cost-effective market-based instruments like pollution taxes or cap-and-trade markets. Using a nationally representative survey experiment, we study whether and why limited understanding of economic principles helps explain this practice. Holding environmental impacts constant, respondents prefer standards over market-based instruments, and prefer producer taxes and cap-and-trade over consumer taxes. These preferences reflect consumers’ beliefs about how these policies will affect electricity bills. Respondents also prefer the weakest environmental targets for consumer taxes and the strongest targets for standards, which suggests that policymakers face a tradeoff between policy stringency and cost effectiveness. A separate survey of environmental economists shows that they have strikingly different beliefs about the effects of environmental policies than the respondents in our representative survey. For example, typical respondents—in contrast to environmental economists—believe that environmental standards increase consumer energy bills less than market-based instruments do. Educational videos on pass-through and cost-effectiveness of policies affect policy support and close some of the gap between nationally representative respondents and experts, which suggests that economic literacy is a factor in voters’ preferences.
35073.zh_abstract: 许多政府使用环境标准，而非更具成本效益的市场化工具，如污染税或总量控制与交易市场。通过一项具有全国代表性的调查实验，我们研究了对经济学原理的有限理解是否以及为何有助于解释这种做法。在保持环境影响不变的情况下，受访者更偏好标准而非市场化工具，并且更偏好生产者税和总量控制与交易，而非消费者税。这些偏好反映了消费者关于这些政策将如何影响电费账单的信念。受访者还偏好针对消费者税的最弱环境目标，以及针对标准的最强目标，这表明政策制定者面临着政策严格性与成本效益之间的权衡。另一项针对环境经济学家的独立调查显示，他们对环境政策效果的信念与我们代表性调查中的受访者截然不同。例如，与环境经济学家相反，典型受访者认为环境标准对消费者能源账单的增加幅度小于市场化工具。关于政策传导和成本效益的教育视频会影响政策支持，并缩小全国代表性受访者与专家之间的一些差距，这表明经济素养是影响选民偏好的一个因素。
35073.meta: Programs：EEE, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C83, D83, D9, H23, Q48, Q50, Q58

35072.title: Risk Preferences and the Willingness to Relocate to Danger: Evidence from Wartime Ukraine
35072.zh_title: 风险偏好与搬迁至危险地区的意愿：来自战时乌克兰的证据
35072.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Marianna Kudlyak, Sophia Lobozynska, Iryna Skomorovych, Ulyana Vladychyn, Andriy Kovalyuk, Iryna Snovydovych
35072.abstract: We elicit reservation wage premia for relocating to two Ukrainian cities, using a household survey conducted in mid-April to mid-July 2024 during the Russian invasion of Ukraine: high-risk Kharkiv (near the frontline) and moderate-risk Kyiv. Risk tolerance is a strong predictor of willingness to move to Kharkiv—the most risk-averse have roughly half the odds of the most risk-tolerant—but matters much less for Kyiv. This asymmetry is difficult to reconcile with the hypothesis that risk tolerance merely proxies for general mobility preferences. Separately estimating the elasticity of intertemporal substitution (EIS≈0.04), we find that including it renders risk tolerance insignificant for Kyiv but not for Kharkiv—a pattern illuminated by the Epstein-Zin separation of risk aversion and the EIS: risk aversion adds predictive power only when danger is high, while the EIS operates equally for both cities as a common relocation-cost channel. The very low EIS implies that relocation incentives structured as future benefits may be ineffective; front-loaded subsidies are more likely to influence behavior.
35072.zh_abstract: 我们利用2024年4月中旬至7月中旬在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰期间进行的一项家庭调查，引出了搬迁至两个乌克兰城市的保留工资溢价：高风险城市哈尔科夫（靠近前线）和中风险城市基辅。风险容忍度是搬迁至哈尔科夫意愿的有力预测指标——最厌恶风险者的几率大约是最能容忍风险者的一半——但对于基辅而言，其重要性要小得多。这种不对称性很难与风险容忍度仅仅是普遍流动偏好代理变量的假设相协调。通过分别估计跨期替代弹性（EIS≈0.04），我们发现，将其纳入模型后，风险容忍度对基辅不再显著，但对哈尔科夫仍然显著——这一模式通过Epstein-Zin对风险厌恶和EIS的分离得以阐明：风险厌恶仅在危险程度高时增加预测能力，而EIS则作为一个共同的搬迁成本渠道对两个城市同等发挥作用。极低的EIS意味着，以未来收益形式构建的搬迁激励可能效果不佳；前置补贴更有可能影响行为。
35072.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：D15, D81, J61, R23

35071.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of Bank Regulation: New Evidence from a High-Frequency Approach
35071.zh_title: 银行监管的宏观经济效应：来自高频方法的新证据
35071.abstract: Bank regulation supports financial stability, but might constrain economic activity. This paper estimates the macroeconomic effects of bank regulation using a high-frequency identification approach. We measure market surprises in a bank stock price index during a narrow time window around Federal Reserve speeches that discuss the US banking system and its regulation. We then develop a sign restriction procedure to elicit the variation in these market surprises that can be interpreted as news about bank regulation. News that bank regulation will be tighter than expected mitigates risk in the banking sector, but reduces economic activity by increasing banks' funding costs and tightening loan supply. A 10 basis point regulation-induced peak reduction in bank risk premiums is accompanied by a 15 basis point peak increase in the unemployment rate. Compared to previous studies, these magnitudes suggest a relatively high macroeconomic cost of tightening bank regulation, at least in the short run.
35071.zh_abstract: 银行监管支持金融稳定，但可能制约经济活动。本文使用高频识别方法估计了银行监管的宏观经济效应。我们衡量了在美联储讨论美国银行体系及其监管的演讲前后一个狭窄时间窗口内，银行股票价格指数的市场意外变动。然后，我们开发了一个符号限制程序，以引出这些市场意外变动中可被解释为银行监管新闻的部分。银行监管将比预期更严格的新闻，会缓解银行部门的风险，但通过增加银行的融资成本和收紧贷款供给来减少经济活动。由监管引起的银行风险溢价峰值降低10个基点，伴随着失业率峰值上升15个基点。与以往研究相比，这些数值表明，至少在短期内，收紧银行监管的宏观经济成本相对较高。

35070.title: Birthright Citizenship and Youth Crime
35070.zh_title: 出生公民权与青少年犯罪
35070.authors: Leander Andres, Stefan Bauernschuster, Gordon B. Dahl, Helmut Rainer, Simone Schüller
35070.abstract: This paper studies the impact of birthright citizenship on youth crime. We leverage a German reform which automatically granted birthright citizenship to eligible immigrant children born in Germany after January 1, 2000 and administrative crime data from three federal states. We find that immigrant youth who acquired citizenship at birth are substantially less likely to engage in criminal activity, with estimates indicating a 70% reduction in crime. These results are particularly relevant in light of ongoing debates in the U.S. about abolishing birthright citizenship. Our findings suggest that inclusive citizenship policies can reduce crime and its associated costs, which in turn could strengthen social cohesion.
35070.zh_abstract: 本文研究了出生公民权对青少年犯罪的影响。我们利用德国的一项改革，该改革自动授予2000年1月1日之后在德国出生的符合条件的移民子女出生公民权，并使用了来自三个联邦州的行政犯罪数据。我们发现，在出生时获得公民身份的移民青少年从事犯罪活动的可能性显著降低，估计表明犯罪率降低了70%。这些结果对于美国关于废除出生公民权的持续辩论尤其具有现实意义。我们的研究结果表明，包容性的公民政策可以减少犯罪及其相关成本，这反过来又可以加强社会凝聚力。

35069.title: Reason for Treason
35069.authors: Xinyu Fan, Gary Richardson, Zhihao Xu, Sicheng Zhao
35069.abstract: Defections during war are extreme changes in loyalty. What motivates military officers to betray their motherland and serve the invaders? Using a novel dataset of career paths for over 2,800 high-ranking (colonels and generals) Nationalist (KMT) military officers during the Second Sino-Japanese War (as part of World War II), we examine defection cases to Japanese puppet regimes. Three findings emerge. First, high-ranking KMT officers who advanced more slowly in their careers were more likely to defect; suggesting that internal organizational recognition matters. Second, officers who were underpromoted compared to their schoolmates and townsmen were more likely to defect, suggesting that peer comparison matters. Third, officers were more likely to defect when their defected peers had better career prospects in the enemy’s camp, suggesting that external recognition matters.
35069.zh_abstract: 战争期间的叛逃是忠诚度的极端转变。是什么促使军官背叛祖国并为入侵者服务？利用第二次世界大战期间（作为二战的一部分）第二次中日战争中超过2800名高级（上校和将军）国民党（KMT）军官职业生涯路径的新数据集，我们考察了向日本傀儡政权叛逃的案例。出现了三个发现。首先，职业生涯晋升较慢的国民党高级军官更有可能叛逃；这表明内部组织认可很重要。其次，与其同学和同乡相比晋升不足的军官更有可能叛逃，这表明同侪比较很重要。第三，当叛逃的同僚在敌方阵营拥有更好的职业前景时，军官更有可能叛逃，这表明外部认可很重要。
35069.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D73, D74, M51, M52, N45

35068.title: High Schools and the Uneven Rise in American Opportunity
35068.zh_title: 高中与美国机遇的不均衡崛起
35068.authors: Alison Doxey, Ezra Karger, Peter Nencka
35068.abstract: Between 1850 and 1910, the share of young Americans living in towns with high schools increased from 17% to 46%—the fastest expansion of school access in U.S. history. Using new data on every high school in the United States, we show that this expansion transformed economic opportunities for many young adults but widened class and racial inequalities. We find sharp increases in school attendance rates for high school-aged children in towns that opened a high school relative to children in nearby towns without one. Linking children to adult outcomes, we show that high schools increased women's labor force participation and job quality, while reducing the probability of early marriage and childbearing. Increased access to high school accounts for a third of the increase in women's labor force participation between 1870 and 1930. High schools had the largest effects on children from already-wealthy families, and did not, on average, benefit Black children. While the high school movement substantially narrowed gender gaps in labor market outcomes, it also widened existing race- and class-based disparities.
35068.zh_abstract: 在1850年至1910年间，居住在有高中城镇的美国年轻人比例从17%增加到46%——这是美国历史上入学机会扩张最快的时期。利用关于美国每所高中的新数据，我们表明这种扩张改变了许多年轻人的经济机会，但扩大了阶级和种族不平等。我们发现，与附近没有高中的城镇的儿童相比，在开设高中的城镇，高中适龄儿童的入学率急剧上升。通过将儿童与其成年后的结果联系起来，我们表明高中提高了女性的劳动力参与率和工作质量，同时降低了早婚和生育的可能性。入学机会的增加解释了1870年至1930年间女性劳动力参与率增长的三分之一。高中对来自已经富裕家庭的儿童影响最大，并且平均而言，并未使黑人儿童受益。虽然高中运动显著缩小了劳动力市场结果中的性别差距，但它也扩大了现存的基于种族和阶级的不平等。
35068.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I2, I25, I28, N00, N31

35067.title: Who Pays for Payments?
35067.authors: Mark L. Egan, Gregor Matvos, Amit Seru, Lulu Wang, Vincent Yao
35067.abstract: We use novel data on the composition and cost of payments across U.S. merchants to quantify consumer redistribution in the payment system. Cards charge interchange fees to merchants to fund consumer rewards. When merchants raise prices for all consumers in response to these costs, users of low-cost payment methods (e.g., cash and debit) cross-subsidize high-reward credit card users who shop at the same merchant. This standard mechanism implicitly assumes that consumers using different payment methods shop at the same merchants and that merchants face similar fees. We show instead that incidence depends on the joint distribution of payment choices across merchants. We document two key forces that shape redistribution. First, consumer sorting—where consumers who use different payment methods shop at different merchants—limits the exposure of cash and debit users to the effects of high interchange fees. Second, interchange fees vary across merchants; where users of different payment methods overlap, such as at large grocery stores, fees are lower due to sector discounts and private negotiations. We embed these forces in a sufficient-statistics framework that maps observed heterogeneity directly into redistribution. We estimate that interchange fees transfer approximately $\$30$ billion every year from cash and debit users to credit card users. Consumer sorting and merchant fee heterogeneity reduce the magnitude of this regressive transfer by 25%, but do not eliminate it. Finally, we show that both the Durbin Amendment and the rise of premium credit cards have been regressive, highlighting how policy and innovation can reshape the incidence of platform fees.
35067.zh_abstract: 我们利用关于美国商户支付构成和成本的新数据来量化支付系统中的消费者再分配。信用卡向商户收取交换费，以资助消费者奖励。当商户为了应对这些成本而提高所有消费者的价格时，在同一商户购物的低成本支付方式（例如现金和借记卡）用户，就会交叉补贴高奖励信用卡用户。这种标准机制隐含地假设使用不同支付方式的消费者在同一商户购物，并且商户面临相似的费用。相反，我们表明，实际负担取决于支付选择在商户间的联合分布。我们记录了塑造再分配的两个关键力量。首先，消费者分类——即使用不同支付方式的消费者在不同商户购物——限制了现金和借记卡用户对高交换费影响的暴露程度。其次，交换费因商户而异；在使用不同支付方式的用户重叠的地方，例如大型杂货店，由于行业折扣和私下谈判，费用较低。我们将这些力量嵌入一个充分统计量框架中，该框架将观察到的异质性直接映射到再分配。我们估计，交换费每年从现金和借记卡用户向信用卡用户转移约3000亿美元。消费者分类和商户费用异质性使这种累退性转移的规模减少了25%，但并未消除它。最后，我们表明，杜宾修正案和高端信用卡的兴起都具有累退性，突显了政策和创新如何重塑平台费用的实际负担。
35067.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：D14, E42, G0, G2, G5, L11, L81

35066.title: Zero Energy Day: How Nationwide Blackouts Affect the Economy
35066.zh_title: 零能源日：全国性停电如何影响经济
35066.authors: Luis E. Gonzales, Koichiro Ito, Mar Reguant
35066.abstract: Electricity reliability is a central challenge for the energy transition, as growing energy demand, renewable energy integration, and natural disasters increase the risk of large-scale black- outs. However, the economic impacts of large-scale blackouts remain largely unknown. Combining electricity market data with high-frequency economic transaction data from Chile, we find that economic activity declined by 35 percent on the nationwide blackout day, but half of this loss was recovered on subsequent days, highlighting the importance of intertemporal substitution. Exploiting spatial variation in blackout severity, we show that accounting for endogenous recovery is critical when estimating the marginal value of lost load.
35066.zh_abstract: 电力可靠性是能源转型的核心挑战，因为不断增长的能源需求、可再生能源整合以及自然灾害增加了大规模停电的风险。然而，大规模停电的经济影响在很大程度上仍然未知。通过将电力市场数据与来自智利的高频经济交易数据相结合，我们发现，在全国停电日，经济活动下降了35%，但这一损失的一半在随后的日子里得以恢复，这突显了跨期替代的重要性。利用停电严重程度的空间差异，我们表明，在估计失负荷边际价值时，考虑内生性恢复至关重要。
35066.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO；JEL：Q4, Q40, Q43, Q5, Q50

35065.title: Multimodal Transport Networks
35065.abstract: Over half of distance-weighted U.S. freight is shipped using more than one transport mode. We examine how multimodal transport networks shape the economic and environmental impacts of infrastructure investments and disruptions. We develop a tractable spatial equilibrium model of multimodal routing with mode-specific congestion at intermodal terminals. We estimate a modal substitution elasticity using road and rail data, and a terminal congestion elasticity using vessel-positioning data.
