Calibrated to the U.S. freight network, the model identifies key bottlenecks and quantifies $.46-$\$1.85$ billion in real GDP gains from intermodal terminal improvements, with additional environmental benefits from shifting away from carbon-intensive road transport. Ignoring mode-specific congestion overstates welfare gains from highway improvements by 85%, while ignoring multimodal flexibility understates them by 22%. Losing rail network access is estimated to reduce real GDP by $\$230$ billion.
35065.zh_abstract: 美国超过一半的按距离加权的货运使用一种以上的运输方式。我们研究了多式联运网络如何塑造基础设施投资和中断的经济与环境影响。我们开发了一个易于处理的多式联运路径选择空间均衡模型，该模型考虑了多式联运枢纽处特定运输方式的拥堵。我们利用公路和铁路数据估计了运输方式替代弹性，并利用船舶定位数据估计了枢纽拥堵弹性。校准到美国货运网络后，该模型识别了关键瓶颈，并量化了多式联运枢纽改进带来的 4.6 亿至 18.5 亿美元的实际 GDP 增长，以及因减少对碳密集型公路运输的依赖而产生的额外环境效益。忽略特定运输方式的拥堵会使高速公路改进的福利收益被高估 85%，而忽略多式联运的灵活性则会使这些收益被低估 22%。据估计，失去铁路网络接入将使实际 GDP 减少 2300 亿美元。

35064.title: Tariffs in 2025: Short-Run Impacts on the U.S. Economy
35064.zh_title: 2025 年的关税：对美国经济的短期影响
35064.abstract: In 2025, the U.S. raised average tariff duties from 2.4% to 9.6%, bringing protectionism to its highest level in eighty years. We explore the structure of these tariffs, estimate their short-run impacts, and summarize the growing literature on their effects. Across trade partners, the tariffs are correlated with trade deficits but not with geopolitical or strategic industrial goals, other than targeting China. In our baseline estimate, 90% of the tariffs are passed through to tariff-inclusive prices paid by U.S. importers. Incorporating the estimated price and trade responses into a static trade framework, we find an overall welfare impact ranging from a loss of 0.13% of GDP to a gain of 0.10%. These small net welfare impacts reflect sizable consumption losses roughly offset by income and revenue gains, with their sign hinging on whether U.S. terms-of-trade adjusted (on which the data are inconclusive). Among their stated rationales, the tariffs have been effective at raising federal revenue and diverting trade from China. However, it remains uncertain whether they will reduce the trade deficit, lower prices set by foreign exporters, promote manufacturing jobs, increase “friend-shoring” among aligned countries, or reshore key sectors; evidence from 2018-19 and 2025 indicators suggests a narrow path towards achieving these goals.
35064.zh_abstract: 2025 年，美国将平均关税税率从 2.4% 提高到 9.6%，使保护主义达到八十年来的最高水平。我们探讨了这些关税的结构，估计了它们的短期影响，并总结了关于其影响的日益增长的文献。在贸易伙伴方面，关税与贸易逆差相关，但与地缘政治或战略性产业目标无关，除了针对中国。在我们的基线估计中，90% 的关税被转嫁给了美国进口商支付的含税价格。将估计的价格和贸易反应纳入一个静态贸易框架，我们发现总体福利影响范围从 GDP 损失 0.13% 到收益 0.10%。这些微小的净福利影响反映了相当大的消费损失被收入和财政收入收益大致抵消，其正负取决于美国的贸易条件是否调整（关于这一点数据尚无定论）。在其声明的理由中，关税在增加联邦收入和将贸易从中国转移方面是有效的。然而，它们是否能减少贸易逆差、降低外国出口商设定的价格、促进制造业就业、增加结盟国家之间的“友岸外包”，或将关键产业回流，仍不确定；来自 2018-19 年和 2025 年指标的证据表明，实现这些目标的路径狭窄。

35063.title: Beyond Demo Day: Sorting and Value Added in Startup Accelerators
35063.zh_title: 超越演示日：创业加速器中的分类与增值
35063.abstract: We study who joins startup accelerators, how founders sort across programs, and which accelerators improve startup outcomes. Using a comprehensive sample of about 750,000 U.S. startups linked to 329 accelerators, we adapt the teacher value-added framework from education economics to estimate accelerator value added (AVA) while accounting for sorting. Selection is systematic: observably better ventures are more likely to enter accelerators and to sort into higher-AVA programs. Yet accelerator performance is highly dispersed. Most accelerators have negative value added relative to a no-accelerator benchmark, while a small right tail generates large gains. High-AVA accelerators predict better long-term outcomes, including acquisition, employment, revenue, and valuation, and are also more likely to accelerate the shutdown of weaker ventures. We validate AVA using internal applicant data from a large U.S. non-equity accelerator.
35063.zh_abstract: 我们研究了谁加入创业加速器，创始人如何在项目之间进行分类，以及哪些加速器能改善创业成果。利用一个包含约 75 万家美国初创企业（与 329 家加速器相关联）的全面样本，我们借鉴了教育经济学中的教师增值框架来估计加速器增值，同时考虑了分类效应。选择是系统性的：可观察到的更好的企业更有可能进入加速器，并分类到更高增值的项目中。然而，加速器的表现高度分散。相对于无加速器的基准，大多数加速器的增值为负，而一个小的右尾部分则产生了巨大的收益。高增值的加速器能预测更好的长期结果，包括收购、就业、收入和估值，并且也更有可能加速较弱企业的关闭。我们利用一家美国大型非股权加速器的内部申请人数据验证了加速器增值。

35062.title: Exploring Trends in Severe Maternal Morbidity in the U.S.
35062.zh_title: 探索美国严重孕产妇发病率的趋势
35062.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Fangning Li, Sara Markowitz
35062.abstract: The incidence of severe maternal morbidity (SMM) in the U.S. has been rising among mothers over time, with especially pronounced increases among Black mothers. In this paper, we examine why this might be happening. Previous literature takes a limited-scope approach by focusing on select variables as determinants of SMM. We take a broader approach and evaluate the contributions of a large set of variables over a long time span to let the data inform us what factors may be most influential in determining SMM. We use inpatient data from 1998-2019 to see how maternal, hospital, and county-level characteristics may be associated with both the rising trends and the racial disparity in SMM. Decomposition methods show that the observed characteristics explain very little of the overall variation of SMM, but account for a substantial share of the Black-White SMM gap. Medical and pregnancy-related comorbid conditions are the largest drivers of the observed variations. The associational findings indicate that focusing on patients with comorbid conditions and delving more deeply into the features of hospital environments may help researchers identify policy-relevant drivers of SMM and SMM disparities.
35062.zh_abstract: 美国严重孕产妇发病率的发病率随着时间的推移在母亲中持续上升，尤其是在黑人母亲中增长更为显著。在本文中，我们研究了这种情况可能发生的原因。以往的文献采用范围有限的方法，侧重于选择少数变量作为严重孕产妇发病率的决定因素。我们采取了更广泛的方法，评估了大量变量在较长时间跨度内的贡献，让数据告诉我们哪些因素可能对决定严重孕产妇发病率最具影响力。我们使用 1998 年至 2019 年的住院数据，观察产妇、医院和县级特征如何与严重孕产妇发病率的上升趋势和种族差异相关联。分解方法表明，观察到的特征几乎无法解释严重孕产妇发病率的总体变异，但解释了黑人与白人之间严重孕产妇发病率差距的很大一部分。医学和妊娠相关的合并症是观察到的变异的最大驱动因素。这些关联性发现表明，关注患有合并症的患者并更深入地研究医院环境的特征，可能有助于研究人员识别与政策相关的严重孕产妇发病率及其差异的驱动因素。

35061.title: Human Capital Markets
35061.abstract: In many low- and middle-income countries, consumers access education and health services in environments characterized by substantial provider choice. In these settings, a dense landscape of fee-charging private providers has emerged, often located near public facilities and competing for the same clientele. We refer to these environments as human capital markets. This chapter begins by documenting that such markets are now pervasive. We present empirical evidence that human capital markets share many features with conventional product markets: households choose among a wide range of public and private providers with heterogeneous attributes, and providers respond strategically to policy interventions and competitive pressures. We then assess the extent to which canonical models from industrial organization can account for observed behavior, highlighting both their insights and their limitations. Next, we examine the key ways in which human capital markets depart from standard product-market benchmarks—most notably that education and health are both consumption goods and investments, and that quality is often difficult to observe—and review empirical and conceptual approaches developed to address these features. We conclude by outlining the major unresolved questions and promising directions for future research.
35061.zh_abstract: 在许多低收入和中等收入国家，消费者在存在大量提供者选择的环境中获取教育和健康服务。在这些环境中，出现了密集的收费私立提供者网络，通常位于公共设施附近，并争夺相同的客户群。我们将这些环境称为人力资本市场。本章首先记录了这类市场现已普遍存在。我们提供的经验证据表明，人力资本市场与传统产品市场有许多共同特征：家庭在具有异质性属性的广泛公共和私人提供者之间进行选择，而提供者则对政策干预和竞争压力做出战略性反应。然后，我们评估了产业组织中的经典模型在多大程度上能够解释观察到的行为，强调了它们的洞察力和局限性。接下来，我们考察了人力资本市场偏离标准产品市场基准的关键方式——最显著的是，教育和健康既是消费品也是投资品，而且质量通常难以观察——并回顾了为应对这些特征而开发的经验和概念方法。最后，我们概述了主要未解决的问题和未来研究的有希望的方向。
35061.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH；JEL：I10, I11, I15, I20, I22, I25, L10, O1, O15

35060.title: The Emergence of the Poverty–Mental Health Gradient and the Great Pakistan Earthquake of 2005
35060.zh_title: 贫困与心理健康梯度的出现与 2005 年巴基斯坦大地震
35060.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Benjamin Daniels, Jishnu Das
35060.abstract: The poverty–mental health gradient varies substantially across populations, far more than sampling variation alone would predict. We treat this heterogeneity as a primary object of empirical interest. Using data collected four years after the 2005 Great Pakistan Earthquake from 126 villages spanning 0–75 km from the activated fault line, we show that in unaffected populations there is no correlation between consumption poverty and mental health. By contrast, among those nearest the fault, mental health improves by 0.12 standard deviations per log unit of consumption, while the relationship is a precise zero beyond 20 km. This gradient is robust to alternative distance thresholds, sample splits, and binary mental health measures, and is not mediated by acute household trauma. These results suggest that mass adversity can activate the poverty–mental health gradient, helping explain heterogeneity in the broader literature.
35060.zh_abstract: 贫困与心理健康之间的梯度在不同人群中差异很大，远超抽样变异本身的预测。我们将这种异质性视为经验研究的主要对象。利用 2005 年巴基斯坦大地震四年后从距活动断层线 0 至 75 公里的 126 个村庄收集的数据，我们表明，在未受影响的人群中，消费贫困与心理健康之间没有相关性。相比之下，在距离断层最近的人群中，每对数单位的消费，心理健康改善 0.12 个标准差，而在 20 公里以外，这种关系精确为零。这种梯度对于替代距离阈值、样本分割和二元心理健康指标是稳健的，并且不受急性家庭创伤的中介作用。这些结果表明，大规模逆境可以激活贫困与心理健康梯度，有助于解释更广泛文献中的异质性。

35059.title: When Policy Shapes Perception: The 2021 Child Tax Credit and Consumer Sentiment
35059.zh_title: 当政策塑造认知：2021 年儿童税收抵免与消费者情绪
35059.abstract: Consumer sentiment influences household behavior in important ways, yet we lack causal evidence on whether government policies themselves shape these perceptions. We help fill this gap by studying the expiration of the expanded 2021 Child Tax Credit (CTC), which abruptly reduced household income for millions of families. Using monthly microdata from the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Survey and plausibly exogenous variation in benefit losses across households, we implement continuous difference-in-differences and instrumental variables strategies. We find that each $\$1,000$ in lost CTC benefits reduces sentiment by 1.7 points (or about 2.4%), with largest effects among lower-income families with multiple children. These effects persist two years after expiration and remain robust to controls for inflation, interest rates, and macroeconomic conditions. The results suggest that fiscal policy impacts perceived economic well-being beyond contemporaneous income effects, with potential implications for household economic activity, political attitudes, and voting behavior.
35059.zh_abstract: 消费者情绪以重要方式影响家庭行为，但我们缺乏关于政府政策本身是否塑造这些认知的因果证据。我们通过研究 2021 年扩大的儿童税收抵免的到期来帮助填补这一空白，该抵免的到期突然减少了数百万家庭的收入。利用密歇根大学消费者情绪调查的月度微观数据以及家庭间福利损失的可信外生变异，我们实施了连续双重差分和工具变量策略。我们发现，每损失 1000 美元的儿童税收抵免福利，情绪就会下降 1.7 个百分点（约 2.4%），对有多名子女的低收入家庭影响最大。这些影响在到期两年后仍然存在，并且在对通货膨胀、利率和宏观经济状况进行控制后依然稳健。结果表明，财政政策对感知经济福祉的影响超出了同期收入效应，可能对家庭经济活动、政治态度和投票行为产生影响。

35058.title: Wellbeing, Youth and Survey Mode: Comparisons across 23 Countries Using Three International Datasets
35058.zh_title: 福祉、青年与调查模式：使用三个国际数据集对 23 个国家的比较
35058.abstract: Although there is growing evidence that the subjective wellbeing among the young declined in recent years, the evidence is not consistent across surveys. We examine the relationship between age and various measures of wellbeing and illbeing across three major surveys – the Gallup World Poll (GWP, Global Minds (GM) and the Global Flourishing Survey (GFS). The GWP is conducted via face-to-face and telephone surveys; GM surveys are web-based; and GFS uses both telephone and web-based surveys. We focus on 23 countries appearing in all three surveys. The clearest evidence that wellbeing rises with age and illbeing declines with age comes from the web-based surveys in both GM and GFS. The age profiles look very different when surveys are conducted by telephone: the higher rates of illbeing among the young are far less apparent in these surveys. Because survey mode is not randomly assigned, we cannot be sure differences in age profiles of wellbeing and illbeing are causally affected by survey mode. Selection into survey mode, both across and within country, plus differential non-response by survey across the age range, may be playing a role. However, the evidence indicates very different age patterns in wellbeing and illbeing emerge across different survey modes.
35058.zh_abstract: 尽管有越来越多的证据表明，近年来年轻人的主观幸福感有所下降，但不同调查的证据并不一致。我们考察了三个主要调查中年龄与各种福祉和不良福祉指标之间的关系——盖洛普世界民意调查、全球思维和全球繁荣调查。盖洛普世界民意调查通过面对面和电话调查进行；全球思维调查基于网络；全球繁荣调查则同时使用电话和网络调查。我们重点关注出现在所有三个调查中的 23 个国家。福祉随年龄增长而上升、不良福祉随年龄增长而下降的最清晰证据来自全球思维和全球繁荣调查中的网络调查。当通过电话进行调查时，年龄分布看起来非常不同：在这些调查中，年轻人中较高的不良福祉率远不那么明显。由于调查模式并非随机分配，我们无法确定福祉和不良福祉的年龄分布差异是否由调查模式因果导致。无论是在国家之间还是国家内部，对调查模式的选择，以及不同年龄范围调查的差异无应答，都可能起到一定作用。然而，证据表明，在不同的调查模式下，福祉和不良福祉的年龄模式呈现出非常不同的结果。

35057.title: Credit Crunches and the Great Stagflation
35057.authors: Itamar Drechsler, Alexi Savov, Philipp Schnabl
35057.abstract: We argue that severe credit crunches in the banking system contributed to the Great Stagflation of the 1970s. The credit crunches were due to Regulation Q, a banking law that capped deposit rates. Under Reg Q, Fed tightening triggered large deposit outflows that led banks to contract lending. The credit crunches line up closely with stagflation in the time series. To explain this, we add Reg Q to a standard model where firms use bank loans to finance working capital. When Reg Q binds and credit contracts, working capital becomes more expensive, leading firms to raise prices and shrink output. The model implies an augmented Phillips curve where monetary tightening reduces aggregate supply in addition to demand. The impact on supply is increasing in the severity of the credit crunches, firms' external finance dependence, and their working capital intensity. We test all three predictions in the cross section of manufacturing industries. In each case, we find that more exposed industries raise prices and cut output relative to others. Our results imply that under severe financial frictions monetary policy affects aggregate supply and not just demand.
35057.zh_abstract: 我们认为，银行体系中的严重信贷紧缩是导致20世纪70年代“大滞胀”的原因之一。信贷紧缩源于Q条例，该银行法对存款利率设置了上限。在Q条例下，美联储收紧货币政策引发了大规模存款外流，导致银行收缩贷款。信贷紧缩在时间序列上与滞胀高度吻合。为解释这一现象，我们将Q条例纳入一个标准模型，在该模型中，企业利用银行贷款为营运资本融资。当Q条例生效且信贷收缩时，营运资本成本上升，促使企业提高价格并缩减产出。该模型推导出一个扩展的菲利普斯曲线，其中货币紧缩在减少需求的同时也降低了总供给。对供给的影响程度随信贷紧缩的严重性、企业的外部融资依赖度及其营运资本密集度的增加而增强。我们利用制造业行业截面数据检验了所有三个预测。在每种情况下，我们发现，相对于其他行业，受冲击更大的行业提高了价格并削减了产出。我们的研究结果表明，在严重的金融摩擦下，货币政策不仅影响需求，也影响总供给。

35056.title: The Chinese Current Account Imbalances: Puzzles, Patterns, and Possible Causes
35056.zh_title: 中国经常账户失衡：谜题、模式与可能原因
35056.abstract: China's large current account surplus has been an irritant to its trading partners. While industrial and trade policies often lead to sector-level imbalances, they play a relatively limited role in the economy-wide surplus. Structural factors such as an unbalanced sex ratio and uneven access to financing by state-owned and non-state firms are more important determinants of the current account imbalance. While macroeconomic stimulus can boost imports and reduce the surplus in the short run, any long-term solution would need to involve reforms aiming at addressing the structural problems.
35056.zh_abstract: 中国庞大的经常账户盈余一直是其贸易伙伴的刺激因素。虽然产业和贸易政策常常导致部门层面的失衡，但它们在整个经济范围的盈余中所起的作用相对有限。结构性因素，如失衡的性别比例以及国有企业和非国有企业融资机会的不均等，是经常账户失衡更重要的决定因素。虽然宏观经济刺激措施能在短期内提振进口并减少盈余，但任何长期解决方案都需要涉及旨在解决结构性问题的改革。

35055.title: The Impacts of Medicaid's Managed Long-Term Services and Supports on Health Outcomes in Medicare
35055.zh_title: 医疗补助计划管理式长期服务与支持对 Medicare 健康结果的影响
35055.authors: Ajin Lee, Maya Rossin-Slater, Becky Staiger, Amanda Su
35055.abstract: An aging US population has raised important questions regarding the organization, delivery, and funding of long-term services and supports (LTSS), prompting many state Medicaid programs to shift from fee-for-service to managed care models for LTSS delivery. We analyze the effects of transitioning to managed LTSS (MLTSS) on health outcomes among dual-eligible Medicare-Medicaid beneficiaries aged 65 and older in Florida and New York. Using Medicare claims data and a differences-in-differences design leveraging county-by-county MLTSS rollouts, we find that MLTSS leads to a 4.2 percent increase in hospitalizations in Florida, but no significant change in New York. Analysis of preventive care suggests that declining flu vaccination rates in Florida may have contributed to increased hospitalizations from respiratory causes. These findings highlight important differences in MLTSS effects across states and underscore the value of Medicare data for measuring health effects in the dual-eligible population.
35055.zh_abstract: 美国人口老龄化引发了关于长期服务与支持（LTSS）的组织、提供和资金筹措的重要问题，促使许多州的医疗补助计划从按服务收费模式转向管理式医疗模式来提供LTSS。我们分析了佛罗里达州和纽约州向管理式长期服务与支持（MLTSS）过渡对65岁及以上同时享受Medicare和Medicaid双重资格受益人的健康结果的影响。利用Medicare索赔数据和基于县级MLTSS逐步推广的双重差分设计，我们发现，在佛罗里达州，MLTSS导致住院率增加4.2%，但在纽约州没有显著变化。对预防性护理的分析表明，佛罗里达州流感疫苗接种率的下降可能导致了呼吸系统原因住院的增加。这些发现凸显了MLTSS在不同州的效果存在重要差异，并强调了利用Medicare数据衡量双重资格人群健康影响的价值。

35054.title: A Tale of Two Countries – The Real Estate Crises in 1990s Japan and Contemporary China
35054.zh_title: 两个国家的故事——1990年代日本与当代中国的房地产危机
35054.abstract: Real estate has long been central to China’s growth model, yet since 2018 its contribution has declined sharply, turning the sector from a key engine of expansion into a major drag on economic activity. While policy tightening might have triggered the downturn, it reflects deeper structural imbalances in a sector that, together with its upstream and downstream linkages and infrastructure, accounts for nearly one-third of aggregate demand. With housing comprising nearly 70 percent of household wealth, the ongoing price correction has generated sizable negative wealth effects, amplifying the contraction through depressed consumption, investment, and sentiment. We document the macroeconomic propagation of China’s real estate downturn and assess the risks of prolonged stagnation should the sector continue to deteriorate. To provide perspective, we compare China’s experience with Japan’s real estate collapse in the 1990s, uncovering striking parallels in investment dynamics and consumption responses despite profound institutional differences. Our findings highlight the importance of real-side channels, including alternative amplification mechanisms (in addition to banking), in generating persistent output losses following real estate busts.
35054.zh_abstract: 房地产长期以来一直是中国增长模式的核心，但自2018年以来，其贡献急剧下降，该部门从经济增长的关键引擎转变为经济活动的主要拖累。虽然政策收紧可能触发了此次低迷，但它反映了该部门更深层次的结构性失衡，该部门连同其上下游关联产业和基础设施，几乎占到了总需求的三分之一。由于住房占家庭财富的近70%，正在进行的价格调整产生了巨大的负财富效应，通过抑制消费、投资和信心加剧了经济收缩。我们记录了中国房地产低迷的宏观经济传导机制，并评估了如果该部门继续恶化可能陷入长期停滞的风险。为了提供参考，我们将中国的经历与日本1990年代的房地产崩盘进行比较，发现尽管存在深刻的制度差异，但在投资动态和消费反应方面存在惊人的相似之处。我们的研究结果强调了实体渠道（包括除银行业之外的替代放大机制）在房地产泡沫破灭后导致持续产出损失方面的重要性。

35053.title: Trade in AI-Related Products
35053.zh_title: 人工智能相关产品的贸易
35053.abstract: This paper documents facts about international trade in AI-related products. I develop a large language model (LLM) classification tool that maps HS10 codes in U.S. trade data to products used in the construction and operation of AI infrastructure. AI-related products account for 23 percent of U.S. imports in 2025, and imports of these products have grown by 73 percent since 2023. Over the same period, imports of non-AI-related products have grown by only 3 percent, with the divergence between the two categories beginning in early 2024. Mexico is a key market on both the import and export side, and together with Taiwan these two countries account for about half of all U.S. trade in AI-related products. Trade policy has treated these products lightly with product-level exemptions shielding much of AI-related imports from tariffs. Absent the AI boom, a simple accounting exercise suggests that the U.S. goods trade deficit would have been nearly $\$200$ billion smaller in 2025.
35053.zh_abstract: 本文记录了关于人工智能相关产品国际贸易的事实。我开发了一个大型语言模型（LLM）分类工具，将美国贸易数据中的HS10编码映射到用于构建和运营AI基础设施的产品上。AI相关产品在2025年占美国进口的23%，自2023年以来，这些产品的进口增长了73%。同期，非AI相关产品的进口仅增长了3%，这两类产品之间的分化始于2024年初。墨西哥是进口和出口两方面的关键市场，与台湾一起，这两个国家和地区约占美国AI相关产品贸易总额的一半。贸易政策对这些产品处理较轻，产品层面的豁免保护了大部分AI相关进口免受关税影响。如果没有AI热潮，一个简单的会计估算表明，2025年美国商品贸易逆差将减少近2000亿美元。

35052.title: The Economic Value of Eliminating Cancer
35052.authors: Tomas J. Philipson, Deyu Zhang, Shumaila Abbasi, Noah Fisher
35052.abstract: This paper estimates the economic value to the United States of eliminating cancer mortality over a 35-year horizon beginning in 2030, which would eliminate 30.7 million cancer deaths with a total mortality burden of 380 million life-years. We quantify the economic value of this substantial reduction in cancer mortality by incorporating the monetized value of increased longevity. To value the longevity gains in monetary terms, we utilize the valuations used by the U.S. federal government in its cost-benefit evaluations of regulations. Eliminating cancer mortality generates $\$197$ trillion in economic benefits over 35 years, corresponding to approximately $\$16,282$ per American per year, or $\$41,684$ per American household per year. If cancer elimination is viewed as an R&D investment, it yields an enormous internal rate of return, ranging from 570% to 1,024%, based on benchmarked R&D costs. In addition, we perform a sensitivity analysis by varying the elimination durations and the degree of success, using the benchmark case scenario in which cancer mortality is reduced by 80 percent over a 20-year transition. This achieves about 70 percent of the total economic value of full elimination above, corresponding to aggregate benefits of about $\$134$ trillion, or approximately $\$11,112$ per person per year.
35052.zh_abstract: 本文估算了从2030年开始的35年时间内，美国消除癌症死亡的经济价值，这将消除3070万例癌症死亡，总死亡负担为3.8亿生命年。我们通过纳入延长寿命的货币化价值，量化了癌症死亡率大幅降低的经济价值。为了用货币术语衡量寿命延长的价值，我们采用了美国联邦政府在其监管成本效益评估中使用的估值。消除癌症死亡在35年内产生197万亿美元的经济效益，相当于每个美国人每年约16,282美元，或每个美国家庭每年约41,684美元。如果将消除癌症视为一项研发投资，基于基准化的研发成本，它将产生巨大的内部收益率，范围从570%到1,024%。此外，我们通过改变消除持续时间和成功程度进行了敏感性分析，使用基准情景，即在20年的过渡期内将癌症死亡率降低80%。这实现了上述完全消除总经济价值的约70%，对应的总收益约为134万亿美元，或每人每年约11,112美元。

35051.title: Tracking the Credibility Revolution across Fields
35051.zh_title: 追踪各领域的可信度革命
35051.abstract: How far has the credibility revolution spread beyond applied microeconomics? I update Currie, Kleven, and Zwiers (2020b) using approximately 44,000 papers—31,500 NBER working papers (1982–2025) and 12,300 articles from eleven top economics and finance journals (2011–2024)—measuring mentions of empirical methods through keyword matching. Three findings emerge. First, finance and macro/other fields differ substantially from applied micro in their mention of credibility revolution methods: as of 2024, 63 percent of applied micro papers mention experimental or quasi-experimental methods, compared to 47 percent in finance and 39 percent in macro/other. The current levels in finance and macro/other are comparable to where applied micro was in 2008–2010, though the long-run trajectories may differ. Second, growth outside applied micro is driven overwhelmingly by difference-in-differences; including DiD raises the share of finance papers mentioning any experimental or quasi-experimental method by roughly 55 percent versus 30 percent for applied micro. Other quasi-experimental methods—instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, experiments—have seen far less growth. Third, I document a striking gap between the methods studied in the Journal of Econometrics—where nonparametric estimation and asymptotic theory dominate—and those used by applied researchers, where DiD and identification strategies dominate. Published journal articles confirm these patterns are not artifacts of the NBER sample.
35051.zh_abstract: 可信度革命在多大程度上已扩展到应用微观经济学之外？我更新了Currie, Kleven, and Zwiers (2020b)的研究，使用了大约44,000篇论文——31,500篇NBER工作论文（1982-2025年）和来自11个顶级经济与金融期刊的12,300篇文章（2011-2024年）——通过关键词匹配来衡量对实证方法的提及。三个发现浮现出来。首先，金融学和宏观/其他领域在提及可信度革命方法方面与应用微观经济学存在显著差异：截至2024年，63%的应用微观经济学论文提及实验或准实验方法，而金融学为47%，宏观/其他领域为39%。金融学和宏观/其他领域目前的水平与应用微观经济学在2008-2010年间的水平相当，尽管长期轨迹可能不同。其次，应用微观经济学之外的增长绝大多数由双重差分驱动；纳入DiD使提及任何实验或准实验方法的金融学论文比例提高了约55%，而应用微观经济学则提高了约30%。其他准实验方法——工具变量、断点回归、实验——的增长则少得多。第三，我记录了《计量经济学杂志》研究的方法（非参数估计和渐近理论占主导）与应用研究人员使用的方法（DiD和识别策略占主导）之间存在显著差距。已发表的期刊文章证实，这些模式并非NBER样本的产物。
35051.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, LS, PE；JEL：B40, C01

35050.title: A Model of Leveraged Bubbles
35050.authors: Nina Biljanovska, Jordi Galí, Lucyna Górnicka, Alexandros P. Vardoulakis
35050.abstract: Recessions that follow asset price booms accompanied by high credit growth are deeper and longer-lasting than those following asset price booms without strong debt accumulation. We develop a dynamic general equilibrium model with a rational asset bubble and an occasionally binding borrowing constraint that reproduces these empirical regularities. The bubble raises collateral values and relaxes borrowing limits during upswings, but tightens them when it bursts. We derive the time-consistent optimal policy and characterize simple borrowing-tax rules approximating it, showing such policies substantially reduce frequency and severity of recessions triggered by bursting of leveraged bubbles.
35050.zh_abstract: 伴随着高信贷增长的资产价格繁荣之后出现的衰退，比那些没有伴随强劲债务积累的资产价格繁荣之后的衰退更深、更持久。我们构建了一个动态一般均衡模型，其中包含理性资产泡沫和偶尔具有约束力的借贷约束，该模型再现了这些经验规律。泡沫在上行期提高了抵押品价值并放松了借贷限制，但在泡沫破裂时收紧了这些限制。我们推导了时间一致的最优政策，并刻画了近似该政策的简单借贷税规则，表明此类政策能显著降低由杠杆泡沫破裂引发的衰退的频率和严重程度。

35049.title: Disagreement of Disagreement
35049.authors: Christian L. Goulding, Campbell R. Harvey, Hrvoje Kurtović
35049.abstract: We show that major investor disagreement proxies have near zero correlation – making disagreement pricing inferences challenging. We develop a frictionless model that generates overpricing from latent disagreement, jointly rationalizes major proxies, and generates new testable predictions. Equilibrium interrelationships motivate a new disagreement measure, DIS, which is more predictive of returns cross-sectionally than major proxies and more consistently predictive across macroeconomic regimes. We provide evidence that the friction-based channel of Miller (1977) and a frictionless mechanism coexist and are empirically separable. DIS also provides a micro-founded, disagreement-based account of the IVOL puzzle, absorbing IVOL's predictability while revealing its regime and friction dependence.
35049.zh_abstract: 我们表明，主要投资者分歧代理指标之间的相关性接近于零——这使得关于分歧定价的推断充满挑战。我们开发了一个无摩擦模型，该模型从潜在分歧中产生高估，共同解释了主要代理指标，并产生了新的可检验预测。均衡的相互关系催生了一个新的分歧度量指标DIS，它在横截面上比主要代理指标更能预测回报，并且在宏观经济体制间具有更一致的预测能力。我们提供的证据表明，Miller（1977）基于摩擦的渠道与一种无摩擦机制并存，并且在实证上可以分离。DIS还为IVOL之谜提供了一个基于微观基础、以分歧为核心的解释，吸收了IVOL的可预测性，同时揭示了其体制依赖性和摩擦依赖性。

35048.title: Consumer Tobacco Product Choices in China: The Impact of a Ban on Flavored E-cigarettes
35048.zh_title: 中国消费者烟草产品选择：禁止调味电子烟的影响
35048.authors: Hua Wang, Yuhan Deng, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Sen Zeng
35048.abstract: A growing body of economic research explores the impacts of U.S. e-cigarette regulations on consumer tobacco choices, but less is known about e-cigarette regulation in China, the world’s largest tobacco market. We study China’s ban of flavored e-cigarettes. The ban of all flavors in e-cigarettes other than tobacco was part of a comprehensive package of regulatory policies adopted in 2022. We collected stated preference data through two discrete choice experiments conducted in 2021 and 2023, with about 600 subjects each. All subjects were adult current smokers. In the experiments, subjects made hypothetical choices between cigarettes, e-cigarettes, and quitting. Product prices and the attributes of e-cigarettes were experimentally varied, allowing us to identify the impact of flavor availability on stated preferences. We use the data to estimate conditional logit models and to predict the impact of the flavor ban and other policies. The empirical results suggest that a ban of flavored e-cigarettes decreases stated preferences for e-cigarettes but also has the unintended consequence to increase stated preferences for cigarettes. Despite the predicted decrease in e-cigarette choices, the predicted choice share of flavored e-cigarettes when they are illegal but loosely enforced is 53% of the predicted share when legal. This large illegal share is consistent with anecdotal evidence and with the evidence from our 2023 background survey that flavored e-cigarettes remain popular after the ban although fewer vapers reported getting their e-cigarettes from specialty or general retailers.
35048.zh_abstract: 越来越多的经济学研究探讨了美国电子烟监管对消费者烟草选择的影响，但对中国这个世界最大烟草市场的电子烟监管知之甚少。我们研究了中国对调味电子烟的禁令。禁止除烟草味以外的所有调味电子烟，是2022年实施的一揽子综合监管政策的一部分。我们通过分别在2021年和2023年进行的两次离散选择实验收集了陈述偏好数据，每次实验约有600名受试者。所有受试者均为当前吸烟的成年人。在实验中，受试者在香烟、电子烟和戒烟之间做出假设性选择。产品价格和电子烟属性通过实验方式变化，使我们能够识别调味品可用性对陈述偏好的影响。我们利用这些数据估计条件Logit模型，并预测调味禁令及其他政策的影响。实证结果表明，禁止调味电子烟降低了电子烟的陈述偏好，但也产生了增加香烟陈述偏好的意外后果。尽管电子烟选择预计会减少，但在调味电子烟非法但执法宽松的情况下，其预测选择份额是合法情况下预测份额的53%。这一巨大的非法份额与传闻证据以及我们2023年背景调查的证据一致，该调查显示，尽管禁令实施后，调味电子烟仍然受欢迎，但报告从专卖店或普通零售商处购买电子烟的电子烟使用者有所减少。

35047.title: Identification and Estimation of Labor Supply Elasticities from Kinked Budget Sets
35047.zh_title: 基于拐点预算集的劳动供给弹性识别与估计
35047.authors: Deniz Dutz, Morten Håvarstein, Magne Mogstad, Alexander Torgovitsky
35047.abstract: We study the identification of labor supply elasticities from kinked budget sets in a model with income effects and individual heterogeneity in the elasticities. We provide point and partial identification results for compensated elasticities, uncompensated elasticities, and income effects. We use administrative data to apply our results to the Norwegian tax system, which exhibits a kink for the self-employed. There is clear bunching around the kink point, suggesting that the self-employed respond to the change in incentives created by the kink. We find that the bounds are often tight even under weak assumptions. Our results show that uncompensated elasticities are close to zero and compensated elasticities are sufficiently small to conclude that the excess burden of taxation is low.
35047.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在收入效应和弹性个体异质性的模型中，从拐点预算集识别劳动供给弹性的问题。我们提供了补偿弹性、非补偿弹性和收入效应的点识别和部分识别结果。我们利用行政数据将我们的结果应用于挪威税收体系，该体系对自雇人士存在一个拐点。在拐点附近存在明显的聚集现象，表明自雇人士对拐点产生的激励变化做出了反应。我们发现，即使在弱假设下，边界通常也是紧的。我们的结果表明，非补偿弹性接近于零，而补偿弹性足够小，可以得出税收超额负担较低的结论。
35047.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C14, C18, H21, H24, J22

35046.title: Forecasting the Economic Effects of AI
35046.zh_title: 预测人工智能的经济效应
35046.authors: Ezra Karger, Otto Kuusela, Jason Abaluck, Kevin A. Bryan, Basil Halperin, Todd R. Jones, Connacher Murphy, Philip Trammell, Matt Reynolds, Dan Mayland, Ria Viswanathan, Ananaya Mittal, Rebecca Ceppas de Castro, Josh Rosenberg, Philip Tetlock
35046.abstract: We elicit forecasts of how AI will affect the U.S. economy, comparing the beliefs of five groups: academic economists, employees at AI companies, policy researchers focused on AI, highly accurate forecasters, and the general public. The median respondent in each group expects substantial advances in AI capabilities by 2030, small declines in labor force participation consistent with demographic shifts, and an annual GDP growth rate of 2.5%, which exceeds both the typical medium-run (2.0%) and long-run (1.7%) baseline forecasts from government agencies and private-sector forecasters. Conditional on a “rapid” AI progress scenario, in which AI systems surpass human performance on many cognitive and physical tasks, experts forecast substantial, though not historically unprecedented, economic shifts: annualized GDP growth rising to around 4% and the labor force participation rate falling from its current level of 62% to 55% by 2050, with roughly half of that decline—equivalent to around 10 million lost jobs—attributable to AI. A variance decomposition suggests that expert disagreement about these effects is driven primarily by different beliefs about the economic effects of highly capable AI systems rather than by disagreement about the pace of AI progress. These forecasts map onto notably different policy preferences across groups: experts strongly favor targeted measures such as worker retraining, whereas the general public supports both targeted programs and broader interventions, including a job guarantee and universal basic income.
35046.zh_abstract: 我们征集了关于人工智能将如何影响美国经济的预测，比较了五类群体的信念：学术经济学家、人工智能公司员工、专注于人工智能的政策研究者、高精度预测者以及普通公众。每组受访者的中位数预期是：到2030年人工智能能力将取得实质性进步，劳动力参与率小幅下降（与人口结构变化一致），以及年GDP增长率为2.5%，这超过了政府机构和私营部门预测者通常给出的中期（2.0%）和长期（1.7%）基线预测。在“快速”人工智能进展情景下（即人工智能系统在许多认知和体力任务上超越人类表现），专家预测了实质性但并非历史上前所未有的经济转变：年化GDP增长率上升至约4%，劳动力参与率从目前的62%下降到2050年的55%，其中约一半的下降（相当于约1000万个工作岗位的损失）可归因于人工智能。方差分解表明，专家对这些效应的分歧主要源于对高能力人工智能系统经济效应的不同信念，而非对人工智能进展速度的分歧。这些预测映射出不同群体间显著不同的政策偏好：专家强烈支持工人再培训等针对性措施，而普通公众既支持针对性计划，也支持更广泛的干预措施，包括工作保障和全民基本收入。
35046.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：C83, E27, J21, O33, O47

35045.title: Bad News and Policy Views: Expectations, Disappointment, and Opposition to Affirmative Action
35045.zh_title: 坏消息与政策观点：期望、失望与对平权行动的反对
35045.authors: Louis-Pierre Lepage, Heather Sarsons, Michael Thaler
35045.abstract: There is widespread opposition to affirmative action policies. We study whether personal disappointments shape preferences for such policies. Specifically, we test whether individuals' college admissions outcomes, relative to their expectations, influence their attitudes toward affirmative action policies. Using a retrospective survey among recent White and Asian college applicants, we find that disappointed individuals—those who were admitted to fewer schools than anticipated—are relatively more likely to believe that affirmative action played an important role in their admissions outcomes, have the lowest support for affirmative action policies, and are more willing to donate to an anti-affirmative action organization. They also hold more negative views about the academic qualifications of under-represented minorities. To isolate the causal effect of "bad news" from selection, we conduct a complementary survey experiment with parents of future college applicants. We randomize whether parents receive information about their child's admissions prospects. Providing bad news to overconfident parents causes them to increase opposition to affirmative action and donate to an anti-affirmative action organization. Results suggest that some individuals attribute bad news to external factors, specifically policies that benefit out-groups.
35045.zh_abstract: 对平权行动政策的反对普遍存在。我们研究个人失望是否会影响对此类政策的偏好。具体来说，我们检验了个人的大学录取结果（相对于其期望）如何影响他们对平权行动政策的态度。通过对近期申请大学的美国白人和亚裔进行回顾性调查，我们发现，失望的个体——即被录取学校少于预期的人——相对更可能认为平权行动在其录取结果中发挥了重要作用，对平权行动政策的支持度最低，并且更愿意向反平权行动组织捐款。他们对少数族裔的学术资质也持有更负面的看法。为了从选择效应中分离出“坏消息”的因果效应，我们进行了一项补充性的调查实验，对象是未来大学申请者的家长。我们随机向家长提供关于其子女录取前景的信息。向过度自信的家长提供坏消息，会导致他们增加对平权行动的反对，并向反平权行动组织捐款。结果表明，一些个体将坏消息归因于外部因素，特别是那些有利于外群体的政策。

35044.title: Predicted Incrementality by Experimentation (PIE) for Ad Measurement
35044.zh_title: 基于实验的预测增量（PIE）用于广告测量
35044.authors: Brett R. Gordon, Robert Moakler, Florian Zettelmeyer
35044.abstract: Randomized controlled trials (RCTs) provide the most credible estimates of advertising incrementality but are difficult to scale. We propose Predicted Incrementality by Experimentation (PIE), which reframes ad measurement as a campaign-level prediction problem. PIE uses a sample of RCTs to learn a mapping from campaign features to causal effects, then applies it to campaigns not run as RCTs. Because the RCTs identify the causal effects, PIE can incorporate post-determined features—campaign-level aggregates such as test-group outcomes, exposure rates, and last-click conversions, computed after campaign completion. These metrics reflect the consumer behaviors that generate treatment effects, so they carry predictive information about incrementality even though they would be invalid controls in a causal model. Using 2,226 Meta ad experiments, PIE achieves an out-of-sample R2 = 0.88 for incremental conversions per dollar, compared to R2 = 0.19 for industry-standard 7-day last-click attribution. In a decision-making framework, PIE disagrees with RCT-based decisions in only 8–12% of campaigns, compared to 12–20% for last-click attribution. We conclude that PIE can help scale causal measurement from a limited number of RCTs to a large set of non-experimental campaigns.
35044.zh_abstract: 随机对照试验（RCT）提供了最可信的广告增量估计，但难以规模化。我们提出了基于实验的预测增量（PIE），它将广告测量重新定义为一场战役层面的预测问题。PIE利用一个RCT样本，学习从战役特征到因果效应的映射，然后将其应用于未进行RCT的战役。由于RCT识别了因果效应，PIE可以纳入事后确定的特征——即战役结束后计算的战役层面汇总指标，如测试组结果、曝光率和最后一次点击转化率。这些指标反映了产生处理效应的消费者行为，因此它们携带关于增量的预测信息，尽管它们在因果模型中会是无效的控制变量。利用2226个Meta广告实验，PIE在每美元增量转化上实现了样本外R²=0.88，而行业标准的7天最后一次点击归因的R²=0.19。在一个决策框架中，PIE与基于RCT的决策不一致的战役仅占8-12%，而最后一次点击归因的这一比例为12-20%。我们得出结论，PIE有助于将因果测量从有限数量的RCT扩展到大量非实验性战役。
35044.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：L81, L82, L86, M3, M30, M31, M37

35043.title: Profit Regulation and Strategic Transfer Pricing by Vertically Integrated Firms: Evidence from Health Care
35043.zh_title: 利润监管与纵向一体化企业的战略性转移定价：来自医疗保健的证据
35043.authors: Pragya Kakani, Eric Yde, Genevieve P. Kanter, Richard G. Frank, Amelia M. Bond
35043.abstract: We provide evidence of strategic transfer pricing by vertically integrated health care firms in response to insurer profit regulations. Insurers increased prices at vertically integrated pharmacies by 9.5% following the introduction of caps on insurer profits in Medicare Part D. We detect larger price increases by insurers that were at greatest risk of exceeding the allowable profit level. More than one-fifth of these higher prices were borne by the federal government. Our analysis illustrates that vertically integrated firms can evade profit regulation by “tunneling” profits to unregulated subsidiaries, undermining regulatory intent and increasing health care spending.
35043.zh_abstract: 我们提供了纵向一体化医疗保健企业为应对保险公司利润监管而采取战略性转移定价的证据。在Medicare D部分引入保险公司利润上限后，保险公司将其纵向一体化药房的价格提高了9.5%。我们检测到，那些最有可能超过允许利润水平的保险公司提价幅度更大。这些更高价格中超过五分之一由联邦政府承担。我们的分析表明，纵向一体化企业可以通过将利润“隧道转移”至未受监管的子公司来规避利润监管，从而破坏监管意图并增加医疗保健支出。
35043.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：I11, I13, I18, L14, L22, L41, L51

35099.title: Organizational Targets in General Equilibrium
35099.zh_title: 一般均衡中的组织目标
35099.authors: Joel P. Flynn, George Nikolakoudis, Karthik A. Sastry
35099.abstract: We build a general equilibrium model in which firms endogenously choose whether to target prices or quantities. We characterize how these choices of organizational targets depend on firms' uncertainty about microeconomic and macroeconomic factors. In equilibrium, the transmission of both nominal and real shocks hinges on firms' organizational targets. For example, under otherwise identical microfoundations, money is neutral under quantity targets and non-neutral under price targets. We further characterize how targets shape firms' strategic interactions and prove that the macroeconomic uncertainty that arises from each choice of targets reinforces incentives to choose that target. That is, choices of organizational targets are strategic complements. For this reason, monetary policy aimed at stabilization can backfire by inducing a regime shift that renders it ineffective. A simple quantification suggests that incentives over organizational targets can vary markedly at business-cycle frequencies and help explain the state-dependent pass-through of monetary shocks to prices and output.
35099.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中企业内生地选择是以价格还是数量为目标。我们描述了这些组织目标的选择如何取决于企业对微观经济和宏观经济因素的不确定性。在均衡中，名义冲击和实际冲击的传导都取决于企业的组织目标。例如，在其他微观基础相同的情况下，货币在数量目标下是中性的，而在价格目标下是非中性的。我们进一步描述了目标如何塑造企业的战略互动，并证明每种目标选择所产生的宏观经济不确定性会强化选择该目标的激励。也就是说，组织目标的选择是战略互补的。因此，旨在稳定经济的货币政策可能适得其反，引发使其失效的体制转变。一个简单的量化表明，组织目标的激励可能在商业周期频率上发生显著变化，并有助于解释货币冲击对价格和产出的状态依赖传导。

35098.title: Treasury Supply Shocks: Propagation Through Debt Expansion and Maturity Adjustment
35098.zh_title: 国债供给冲击：通过债务扩张和期限调整的传导
35098.authors: Huixin Bi, Maxime Phillot, Sarah Zubairy
35098.abstract: Historically high debt-to-GDP levels in the U.S. have raised concerns about future financial market stability and fiscal sustainability. We use high-frequency data and consider Treasury futures price changes within narrow windows around auction announcements in order to identify two distinct Treasury supply shocks: debt volume shocks that capture changes in the level of public debt, and maturity adjustment shocks that reflect changes in the maturity structure. We find that debt expansion shocks raise yields across the curve by increasing term premia, leading to tighter financial conditions. These shocks crowd out private sector activity by reducing investment and production, particularly during periods of rapid debt growth. In contrast, maturity extension shocks steepen the yield curve while lowering credit risk premia and fiscal uncertainty. By reducing risk premia, these shocks stimulate near-term investment and production, even as higher long-term borrowing costs weigh on longer-horizon investment. We also show that the Treasury debt management policy can meaningfully interact with the Federal Reserve's asset purchase programs.
35098.zh_abstract: 美国历史高位的债务与GDP之比引发了对未来金融市场稳定性和财政可持续性的担忧。我们使用高频数据，并考虑拍卖公告发布前后狭窄窗口内的国债期货价格变化，以识别两种不同的国债供给冲击：捕捉公共债务水平变化的债务数量冲击，以及反映期限结构变化的期限调整冲击。我们发现，债务扩张冲击通过提高期限溢价来推高整个收益率曲线上的收益率，导致金融状况收紧。这些冲击通过减少投资和生产来挤出私营部门活动，尤其是在债务快速增长时期。相比之下，期限延长冲击使收益率曲线变陡，同时降低了信用风险溢价和财政不确定性。通过降低风险溢价，这些冲击刺激了短期投资和生产，即使较高的长期借贷成本对长期投资构成压力。我们还表明，国债债务管理政策可以与美联储的资产购买计划产生有意义的互动。

35097.title: Health Inequalities among Retirees in the Netherlands
35097.zh_title: 荷兰退休人员的健康不平等
35097.abstract: In the Netherlands, life expectancy has continued to rise over the last two decades and the distribution of the age of death has narrowed, which suggests a decrease in health inequality. For the same period, however, the income-mortality gradient has increased, which suggests that the health gains have been unequally distributed across the income distribution. We examine the latter suggestion using data for the Netherlands of the longitudinal Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe. Our empirical findings show no significant changes in income-based physical and mental health inequalities during the last two decades. Arguably, larger samples, such as administrative data which is often used to analyze the income-mortality gradient, are needed to investigate in more detail the evolution of physical and mental health inequalities before drawing firm conclusions.
35097.zh_abstract: 在荷兰，过去二十年预期寿命持续上升，死亡年龄的分布范围缩小，这表明健康不平等有所减少。然而，在同一时期，收入-死亡率梯度却增加了，这表明健康收益在收入分配中的分布并不均衡。我们使用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休纵向调查的荷兰数据来检验后一种观点。我们的实证研究结果显示，在过去二十年中，基于收入的身体和心理健康不平等没有显著变化。可以说，在得出确切结论之前，需要更大的样本（例如常用于分析收入-死亡率梯度的行政数据）来更详细地研究身体和心理健康不平等的演变。

35096.title: Declining Occupations and Career Outcomes in Norway
35096.zh_title: 挪威的衰落职业与职业结果
35096.authors: Erling Barth, Maria Forthun Hoen, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
35096.abstract: Occupational change is a central feature of modern labor markets. This paper examines the career consequences in Norway of being initially employed in an occupation that subsequently declines during 2007–2024. Workers initially employed in occupations that later decline by at least 25% demonstrate 0.4 lower future years of work, although this employment difference is mostly explained by other individual traits. These workers, conditional on controls, experience a 4.7% reduction in future cumulative earnings relative to starting earnings, akin to losing one year’s worth of earnings over 2007–2024.
35096.zh_abstract: 职业变化是现代劳动力市场的一个核心特征。本文研究了在挪威，最初受雇于一个随后在2007-2024年间衰落的职业所带来的职业后果。最初受雇于后来至少衰落25%的职业的工人，其未来的工作年限减少了0.4年，尽管这种就业差异主要可由其他个人特征解释。在控制其他因素后，这些工人相对于起始收入的未来累计收入减少了4.7%，相当于在2007-2024年间损失了一年的收入。

35095.title: Homemade Foreign Trading
35095.authors: Zhiguo He, Yuehan Wang, Xiaoquan Zhu
35095.abstract: Using cross-border holding data from all custodians in China’s Stock Connect, we provide evidence that Chinese mainland insiders evade see-through surveillance by round-tripping via the program. Following the 2018 Northbound Investor Identification reform, the return predictability of northbound flows decays, as does their correlation with insider trading. This reduction is especially pronounced among less prestigious foreign custodians and cross-operating mainland custodians, where insiders are more likely to hide. Furthermore, the reform erodes price informativeness, particularly in stocks with high exposure to homemade foreign investors. Our analysis highlights the role of regulatory cooperation in capital market integration.
35095.zh_abstract: 利用中国沪深港通所有托管机构的跨境持股数据，我们提供了证据表明中国内地内部人士通过该计划进行往返交易以规避穿透式监管。在2018年北向投资者识别码制度改革之后，北向资金流动的回报可预测性下降，其与内幕交易的相关性也随之减弱。这种减少在那些不太知名的外资托管机构和跨境经营的内地托管机构中尤为明显，内部人士更有可能在这些机构中隐藏交易。此外，该改革削弱了价格信息含量，尤其是在那些对自制外资投资者敞口较高的股票中。我们的分析强调了资本市场一体化中监管合作的作用。
35095.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F3, G14, G15, G28

35094.title: Changes in Health Inequalities among Older Individuals in Japan
35094.zh_title: 日本老年人健康不平等的变化
35094.abstract: This study examined how health inequalities with respect to income have changed among older adults in Japan from 2001 to 2022. The past two decades have witnessed a series of public pension reforms and increased labor force participation among older individuals. The pro-rich concentration of good health has become less clear for self-rated health and activities of daily living among older men. However, income-related inequality in stress/anxiety increased over time in men, and no clear trend was observed for health deficiencies or conditions. Compared to men, women showed more mixed results, with widening inequalities in health deficiencies and conditions.
35094.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2001年至2022年间日本老年人中与收入相关的健康不平等如何变化。过去二十年见证了一系列公共养老金改革以及老年人劳动参与率的提高。在老年男性中，良好健康向富人集中的现象在自评健康和日常生活活动能力方面变得不那么明显。然而，男性中与收入相关的压力/焦虑不平等随时间增加，而在健康缺陷或健康状况方面没有观察到明显趋势。与男性相比，女性的结果更为复杂，在健康缺陷和健康状况方面的不平等有所扩大。

35093.title: The Inefficient Pricing of News
35093.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Bryan T. Kelly, Mohammad Pourmohammadi, Hanqing Tian
35093.abstract: The stock market fails to efficiently process information in news text (Chen et al., 2026). But news itself is highly predictable by prevailing stock characteristics, which complicates inferences about market efficiency. After purging news of its predictable content, the remaining “pure news” more than doubles the monthly return predictive power of raw news, and it continues to significantly predict returns up to 18 months ahead. The magnitude and longevity of the pure news anomaly is greater than those of every anomaly in the Jensen et al. (2022) universe. It derives from negative-tone and quantitative topics to which investors underreact and from high-attention and ambiguous topics to which investors overreact.
35093.zh_abstract: 股票市场未能有效处理新闻文本中的信息（Chen et al., 2026）。但新闻本身在很大程度上可由当前的股票特征预测，这使关于市场有效性的推断变得复杂。在剔除新闻中可预测的内容后，剩余的“纯新闻”使原始新闻的月度回报预测能力提高了一倍以上，并且它能在长达18个月的时间内持续显著预测回报。纯新闻异象的幅度和持久性超过了Jensen等人（2022）研究范围内所有异象。它源于投资者反应不足的负面情绪和量化主题，以及投资者反应过度的高关注度和模糊主题。
35093.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C58, G02, G1, G11, G12, G14, G17, G40, G41

35092.title: The Medical Expansion, Life Expectancy, and Endogenous Directed Technical Change
35092.zh_title: 医疗扩张、预期寿命与内生定向技术变革
35092.authors: Leon Huetsch, Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig
35092.abstract: We build a unified quantitative theory of increasing adult life expectancy and income growth in the last two centuries, and the emergence of a modern health sector in the 20th century. We interpret the data as three phases of a dynamic equilibrium in which households are initially poor, the price of health goods is prohibitively high, and life expectancy is stagnant. As technological progress fuels income growth, households commence consuming basic health goods and life expectancy rises in the first half of the 19th century. 100 years later, further directed technological progress leads to the emergence of a modern health sector. \nThrough the lens of the model, the quality-adjusted relative price of modern health goods declined by about 2.5% per year between 1940 and 2020 while the model-implied relative price that lacks quality adjustment increases in line with the BEA health price index. Counterfactual analyses suggest that almost one fourth of adult life expectancy gains between 1940 and 2020 are attributed to the emergence and expansion of modern health and that public spending on health R&D during World War II played an important role in the kickoff of the modern health sector.
35092.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个统一的量化理论，用以解释过去两个世纪中成人预期寿命和收入增长的同时增加，以及20世纪现代健康部门的出现。我们将数据解释为动态均衡的三个阶段：最初家庭贫困，健康商品价格高得令人望而却步，预期寿命停滞不前。随着技术进步推动收入增长，家庭在19世纪上半叶开始消费基本健康商品，预期寿命上升。100年后，进一步的定向技术进步导致了现代健康部门的出现。根据该模型的视角，1940年至2020年间，经质量调整的现代健康商品相对价格每年下降约2.5%，而模型隐含的未经质量调整的相对价格则与BEA健康价格指数同步上升。反事实分析表明，1940年至2020年间成人预期寿命的增长中，近四分之一归因于现代健康的出现和扩张，而二战期间公共健康研发支出在现代健康部门的启动中发挥了重要作用。

35091.title: Belief Dispersion and Entrepreneurial Entry
35091.abstract: When should a founder act on a strong belief about an opportunity, knowing that rivals assessing the same opportunity may hold very different views? This paper studies entry decisions when entrepreneurs hold heterogeneous beliefs about an opportunity's value and each founder knows only the range of views rivals might hold. In equilibrium, a founder enters only when their conviction exceeds a threshold set by anticipated rival optimism. The relationship between belief dispersion and entry is surprisingly rich: depending on the founder's conviction and the cost of entry, there may be no level of dispersion that supports entry, all levels may support it, or only a middle range may, so that an outside observer may see the most entry at intermediate levels of belief dispersion. When founders can delay, high dispersion that deters immediate entry need not prevent it altogether: the absence of rival action gradually reveals that competitors are less bullish than feared. Finally, not all conviction-building is equal. Validation that only the founder sees strengthens entry incentives fully, whereas validation visible to the whole market partly backfires by encouraging rivals. The paper formalises the intuition that entrepreneurial value comes not from optimism alone but from optimism that the founder anticipates rivals will not share, and derives predictions linking belief dispersion to entry patterns.
35091.zh_abstract: 创始人何时应该基于对某个机会的强烈信念采取行动，同时知道评估同一机会的竞争对手可能持有截然不同的观点？本文研究了当企业家对某个机会的价值持有异质性信念，且每位创始人只知道竞争对手可能持有的观点范围时的进入决策。在均衡状态下，只有当创始人的信念强度超过由预期竞争对手乐观程度设定的阈值时，他们才会进入。信念分散与进入之间的关系出人意料地丰富：取决于创始人的信念强度和进入成本，可能不存在任何支持进入的分散水平，所有水平都可能支持进入，或者只有中间范围支持进入，以至于外部观察者可能会看到在中等信念分散水平下进入最多。当创始人可以延迟进入时，阻止立即进入的高分散性并不一定会完全阻止进入：竞争对手缺乏行动逐渐揭示出竞争者并不像担心的那样乐观。最后，并非所有信念建立都是平等的。只有创始人看到的验证会完全增强进入激励，而整个市场可见的验证则会通过鼓励竞争对手而部分适得其反。本文形式化了这样一种直觉：创业价值并非仅仅来自乐观情绪，而是来自创始人预期竞争对手不会分享的乐观情绪，并推导出将信念分散与进入模式联系起来的预测。

35090.title: Information Treatments, Hypotheticals, and Event Studies: Comparative Estimates
35090.zh_title: 信息处理、假设情境与事件研究：比较估计
35090.authors: Carola Binder, Dimitris Georgarakos, Pei Kuang, Li Tang
35090.abstract: We study how consumer expectations respond to monetary policy announcements using a two-wave survey experiment around the September 2025 FOMC meeting. We compare three commonly used approaches to identifying causal effects on expectations: hypothetical ("vignette’’) scenarios, randomized control trials, and event studies. All three identification strategies yield qualitatively similar results: a rate cut reduces short- and long-run inflation expectations, raises expectations of economic activity, and lowers unemployment expectations. The estimated magnitudes are similar across the randomized controlled trial and event-study approaches, but relatively larger for vignette-based measures. Within-respondent comparisons further show that individuals who revise their expectations more in response to vignette scenarios also exhibit larger revisions following actual policy announcements and experimental information treatments.
35090.zh_abstract: 我们利用围绕2025年9月联邦公开市场委员会(FOMC)会议开展的两轮调查实验，研究消费者预期如何对货币政策公告做出反应。我们比较了三种常用于识别对预期因果效应的方法：假设情境（“小插曲”）场景、随机对照试验和事件研究。所有三种识别策略都产生了定性相似的结果：降息降低了短期和长期通胀预期，提高了经济活动预期，并降低了失业预期。估计的幅度在随机对照试验和事件研究方法之间相似，但基于小插曲的衡量标准相对更大。受访者内部的比较进一步表明，那些对小插曲场景预期修正幅度更大的个体，在对实际政策公告和实验性信息处理做出反应时，也表现出更大的修正幅度。

35089.title: Aging at the Very Top
35089.authors: Valentin Kecht, Alessandro Lizzeri, Farzad Saidi
35089.abstract: This paper documents that the age at which CEOs are appointed has risen sharply over the past several decades. Using newly assembled data covering a wide set of firms, we show that this increase is concentrated outside the largest listed firms and driven primarily by longer and more diverse external career paths prior to CEO appointment. These patterns are difficult to reconcile with explanations based on demographics, schooling, or tenure, and are instead consistent with a matching framework in which rising demand for generalist human capital leads firms to trade off peak ability for accumulated experience. We investigate the forces behind this shift. Using variation in consulting networks, we establish that firms place greater weight on diversified managerial experience as operating environments have become increasingly uncertain and complex. We also provide evidence for a supply-side response in which prospective CEOs broaden their skill portfolio as demand for generalist skills rises.
35089.zh_abstract: 本文记录了在过去几十年中，首席执行官被任命时的年龄急剧上升。利用新收集的涵盖广泛企业的数据，我们表明这种增长集中在最大的上市公司之外，并且主要是由首席执行官任命前更长、更多样化的外部职业路径所驱动。这些模式难以用基于人口统计、教育或任期的解释来调和，反而与一个匹配框架相一致，在该框架中，对通才型人力资本日益增长的需求导致企业在巅峰能力与积累的经验之间进行权衡。我们调查了这种转变背后的力量。利用咨询网络的差异，我们确定，随着运营环境变得越来越不确定和复杂，企业更加重视多元化的管理经验。我们还提供了供给侧反应的证据，即随着对通才技能需求的上升，潜在的首席执行官会拓宽他们的技能组合。
35089.meta: Programs：AG, CF, LS；JEL：J10, J21, J24, M12, M51

35088.title: The Declining Local Bias of Entrepreneurship in the United States
35088.zh_title: 美国创业精神本地偏好的下降
35088.authors: Innessa Colaiacovo, Margaret G. Dalton, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr
35088.abstract: Multiple studies document a local bias of entrepreneurship (LBE) in recent decades, where self-employed entrepreneurs are systematically more likely than wage workers to operate in their region of birth. This paper documents an important new fact: the LBE has been declining in the United States since 1970. The LBE is still present for white men engaged in self-employment, but it no longer exists for the overall U.S.-born workforce. We connect that decline to the transformation of self-employment away from high startup-capital sectors and the reduced opportunity for local self-employed entrepreneurs to achieve high incomes compared to wage work.
35088.zh_abstract: 多项研究记录了近几十年来创业精神的本地偏好(LBE)，即自雇企业家在其出生地经营的比例系统性地高于工薪劳动者。本文记录了一个重要的新事实：自1970年以来，美国的LBE一直在下降。对于从事自雇的白人男性来说，LBE仍然存在，但对于整个美国出生的劳动力来说，它已不复存在。我们将这种下降与自雇从高启动资本行业的转型，以及本地自雇企业家相比工薪工作获得高收入的机会减少联系起来。
35088.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：D24, G51, J11, J24, J62, L26, M13, R11, R13

35087.title: The Unseen Costs of Blue Skies: Pollutant Substitution and Biodiversity Loss
35087.zh_title: 蓝天的隐性成本：污染物替代与生物多样性丧失
35087.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Siyuan Li, Huanhuan Wang, Zhiqiang Zhang
35087.abstract: Incomplete performance metrics distort incentives. Exploiting the staggered roll-out of China’s national air monitoring network, we document a pollutant substitution effect: PM₂.₅ fell significantly, yet O₃ surged. We trace this to strategic behavior: facing binding PM₂.₅ targets, local governments prioritized abatement of particulate precursors while neglecting ozone precursors. Critically, this was not a benign trade-off. Although the policy reduced PM₂.₅-attributed deaths, the policy-induced O₃ surge increased O₃-attributed mortality and reduced biodiversity (measured by bird abundance). Conservative estimates suggest these costs reduced the policy’s net benefits by approximately 23.8%. Our findings highlight the hidden social costs of narrow performance targeting.
35087.zh_abstract: 不完整的绩效指标会扭曲激励。利用中国国家空气监测网络的分阶段推广，我们记录了一种污染物替代效应：PM₂.₅显著下降，但O₃却激增。我们将此归因于策略性行为：面对具有约束力的PM₂.₅目标，地方政府优先减少颗粒物前体物，而忽视了臭氧前体物。关键的是，这并非良性的权衡。尽管该政策减少了PM₂.₅导致的死亡，但政策引发的O₃激增增加了O₃导致的死亡率，并减少了生物多样性（以鸟类丰度衡量）。保守估计表明，这些成本使该政策的净收益减少了约23.8%。我们的研究结果凸显了狭隘绩效目标设定的隐性社会成本。
35087.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：D73, H77, Q53, Q57, Q58

35086.title: If You Build It, They May Not Come: Willingness to Participate in Managed EV Charging
35086.zh_title: 如果你建好了，他们可能不会来：参与电动汽车管理充电的意愿
35086.authors: Fiona Burlig, James B. Bushnell, David S. Rapson
35086.abstract: Despite the importance of program participation for policy, treatment effects are often measured on self-selected samples. We study electric vehicle (EV) managed charging, intended to reduce electric grid strain by optimally allocating charging across EVs. Prior work finds large impacts of managed charging among households who volunteer for an RCT. In contrast, we test managed charging with an experiment including all EVs within a California utility. Enrollment is low even with high incentives, and we can reject even modest intent-to-treat effects on electricity consumption. Managed charging is less effective than previously thought, underscoring the value of population-wide experiments.
35086.zh_abstract: 尽管项目参与对政策至关重要，但处理效应通常是在自选样本上衡量的。我们研究电动汽车(EV)管理充电，旨在通过优化分配所有电动汽车的充电来减轻电网压力。先前的研究发现，在自愿参加随机对照试验的家庭中，管理充电产生了巨大影响。相比之下，我们通过一项包含加州一家公用事业公司内所有电动汽车的实验来测试管理充电。即使提供高额激励，注册率也很低，并且我们可以拒绝管理充电对电力消费存在哪怕适度的意向性治疗效应。管理充电的效果不如先前认为的那样有效，这凸显了全人群实验的价值。

35085.title: Le Bureau des Légendes: A Dynamic Theory of Double Agents
35085.zh_title: 传奇办公室：双重间谍的动态理论
35085.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Franco Mettola La Giglia
35085.abstract: This paper models double agents—individuals coerced into simultaneously serving two rival intelligence agencies—as a finite-horizon trilateral game between Agency A, Organization B, and the Mole M. The double agent persists within a corridor of survival: a set of bilateral beliefs under which both principals continue the relationship. Under a linear-quadratic-Gaussian benchmark, we obtain a closed-form characterization of the corridor geometry, analytical upper bounds on expected duration, and three main results: (i) existence of a double-agent equilibrium, (ii) structural transitoriness— belief updating, terminal unraveling, and compounding survival risk ensure inevitable collapse, and (iii) comparative statics linking monitoring technology, punishment severity, and protection costs to expected duration. The key mechanism is self-destructive experimentation: B learns about the mole’s type through both the type-dependence of effort and the traceability channel γ, which amplifies this learning. Extensions establish existence under general specifications and show that duration decays exponentially in the number of rival agencies. Predictions are consistent with historical patterns from Kim Philby to the Cold War mole hunts. The setting—bilateral coercion, existential participation constraints, and Bayesian learning in a finite-horizon trilateral structure— defines what we term antagonistic common agency.
35085.zh_abstract: 本文将双重间谍——即被胁迫同时为两个敌对情报机构服务的个人——建模为A机构、B组织和鼹鼠M之间的有限期三方博弈。双重间谍在一个生存走廊内持续存在：这是一组双边信念，在此信念下，两个委托人都继续维持关系。在线性-二次型-高斯基准下，我们获得了走廊几何形状的闭式表征、预期持续时间的解析上界以及三个主要结果：(i) 双重间谍均衡的存在性，(ii) 结构性暂时性——信念更新、终端瓦解和累积生存风险确保了不可避免的崩溃，以及 (iii) 将监控技术、惩罚严厉程度和保护成本与预期持续时间联系起来的比较静态分析。关键机制是自我毁灭性的实验：B通过努力的类型依赖性以及放大这种学习的可追溯性渠道γ来了解鼹鼠的类型。扩展分析确立了在一般设定下的存在性，并表明持续时间随着敌对机构数量的增加而呈指数衰减。预测与从金·菲尔比到冷战鼹鼠搜捕的历史模式一致。这种设定——双边胁迫、存在性参与约束以及有限期三方结构中的贝叶斯学习——定义了我们所谓的对抗性共同代理。

35084.title: Gender Mix and Team Performance: Evidence from Obstetrics
35084.zh_title: 性别构成与团队绩效：来自产科的证据
35084.abstract: We investigate how the gender mix of expert teams affects performance in a high-stakes setting: childbirth. Using data on 2.5 million births, we exploit the quasi-exogenous assignment of patients to two-member obstetrician teams (Lead–Assisting), and find that: (i) female-only teams achieve the best maternal outcomes, whereas male-only teams have the worst; and (ii) female-led mixed-gender teams perform worse than male-led ones. Specifically, severe maternal complications are 15.8% higher in male-only teams and 7.1-10.8% higher in mixed-gender teams compared to female-only teams. These patterns cannot be explained by patient risk, endogenous team formation, or physician preferences for discretionary practices like C-sections. Instead, gender mix directly affects team decisions and performance, likely through gender norms — a mechanism supported by two findings. First, gender mix affects how closely team decisions reflect member preferences, with female-only teams being especially skilled at this process, possibly due to more collaborative decision-making. Second, gender mix affects team resilience, with female-led mixed gender teams performing especially poorly under challenging conditions (e.g., limited team familiarity), possibly because female leaders invert traditional gender norms. We also document other notable patterns: female-only teams not only achieve the lowest complication rates for Black women, but are also the only team type to have no racial disparity in maternal outcomes. Overall, this study provides new insights into gender dynamics in expert teams, informing managerial efforts to support effective collaboration in increasingly diverse workplaces.
35084.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在高风险环境——分娩中，专家团队的性别构成如何影响绩效。利用250万次分娩的数据，我们利用患者被准外生地分配给两人产科医生团队（主刀-协助）这一情况，发现：(i) 全女性团队实现了最佳的母亲结局，而全男性团队则最差；(ii) 女性领导的混合性别团队表现不如男性领导的混合性别团队。具体来说，与全女性团队相比，全男性团队的严重母亲并发症高出15.8%，混合性别团队则高出7.1-10.8%。这些模式无法用患者风险、内生团队形成或医生对剖腹产等自由裁量做法的偏好来解释。相反，性别构成直接影响团队决策和绩效，很可能是通过性别规范——这一机制得到了两个发现的支持。首先，性别构成影响团队决策反映成员偏好的紧密程度，全女性团队在此过程中尤其擅长，这可能是由于更具协作性的决策制定。其次，性别构成影响团队韧性，女性领导的混合性别团队在具有挑战性的条件下（例如，有限的团队熟悉度）表现尤其糟糕，这可能是因为女性领导者颠覆了传统的性别规范。我们还记录了其他值得注意的模式：全女性团队不仅为黑人女性实现了最低的并发症率，而且是唯一在母亲结局上没有种族差异的团队类型。总体而言，这项研究为专家团队中的性别动态提供了新的见解，为管理人员在日益多元化的职场中支持有效协作提供了信息。

35082.title: The Effect of Annuities on Longevity
35082.authors: Borja Larrain, Alessandro Previtero, Felipe Severino
35082.abstract: We examine how annuities affect longevity using administrative payout data on approximately 600,000 Chilean retirees from 2004 to 2022. To address selection into annuitization, we exploit the fact that annuity sales vary with recent market returns, a pattern consistent with extrapolative beliefs. We find that the decision to annuitize—instrumented by recent market returns—substantially reduces mortality at five- and ten-year horizons. Further analyses indicate that annuities reduce mortality by shielding retirees from income volatility and investment-related stress. Complementary survey evidence suggests that annuitants invest more in health and report lower disability rates.
35082.zh_abstract: 我们利用2004年至2022年约60万名智利退休人员的行政支付数据，研究年金如何影响长寿。为了解决年金化中的选择性问题，我们利用了年金销售随近期市场回报率变化这一事实，这种模式与外推信念一致。我们发现，年金化的决定——以近期市场回报率为工具变量——在五年和十年的时间跨度上显著降低了死亡率。进一步的分析表明，年金通过保护退休人员免受收入波动和投资相关压力的影响来降低死亡率。补充性的调查证据表明，年金领取者在健康方面投入更多，并且报告的残疾率更低。
35082.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：D14, G22, G41, G51, G52, J26

35081.title: Impact Trickles Down: A General Equilibrium Theory of Stakeholder Exit and Engagement
35081.zh_title: 影响层层传递：利益相关者退出与参与的一般均衡理论
35081.abstract: How do purpose-driven stakeholders induce reform? Using a multi-sided matching equilibrium, we show that whether they exit or engage depends on whether social harm scales with productivity. When harm is uncorrelated—an implicit assumption in most literature—purpose-driven stakeholders engage and compensating differentials adjust. But when harm scales with production, high-productivity firms outbid others for profit-driven stakeholders to avoid mitigation. Purpose-driven stakeholders exit—a seemingly ineffective action at the firm level but whose impact trickles down the productivity ladder and across stakeholder types. This necessitates a multi-sided framework, rationalizes puzzling findings, and explains why studies underestimate the aggregate impact of exit.
35081.zh_abstract: 目标驱动的利益相关者如何引发改革？通过使用多边匹配均衡，我们证明了他们是退出还是参与取决于社会危害是否随生产率变化。当危害不相关时——这是大多数文献中的隐含假设——目标驱动的利益相关者会参与，补偿性差异会进行调整。但当危害随生产规模扩大时，高生产率企业会出价高于其他企业，以吸引利润驱动的利益相关者，从而避免缓解措施。目标驱动的利益相关者选择退出——这在企业层面看似无效，但其影响会沿着生产率阶梯并跨越利益相关者类型层层传递。这需要一个多边框架，解释了令人困惑的发现，并说明了为何研究低估了退出的总体影响。
35081.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, PE；JEL：G0, G19, G20, G3, G35, G39, H4, H40

35080.title: Hospital Billing Regulations and Financial Well-Being: Evidence from California’s Fair Pricing Law
35080.zh_title: 医院收费法规与财务福祉：来自加州公平定价法的证据
35080.authors: Yaa Akosa Antwi, Marion Aouad, Nathan Blascak
35080.abstract: We examine the financial consequences of the 2007 California Fair Pricing Law, which places a price ceiling on hospital bills for financially vulnerable individuals. Using cross-sectional variation in exposure to the law, proxied by county-level uninsured rates, we estimate its impact on individual financial outcomes. We find that the law reduces the likelihood of incurring non-medical debt in collections and the number of non-medical accounts in collections. In addition, we find evidence that credit scores increased and suggestive evidence that the number of delinquent accounts decreased for individuals in more exposed counties. Our results suggest hospital billing regulations can improve targeted individuals’ financial outcomes.
35080.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2007年加州公平定价法的财务后果，该法对经济脆弱个体的医院账单设置了价格上限。利用法律覆盖程度的横截面差异（以县级未参保率作为代理变量），我们估计了该法对个人财务结果的影响。我们发现，该法降低了产生非医疗催收债务的可能性以及非医疗催收账户的数量。此外，我们发现有证据表明，在受法律影响更大的县，个人信用评分有所提高，并且有提示性证据表明拖欠账户数量有所减少。我们的结果表明，医院收费法规可以改善目标个体的财务结果。

35079.title: How Have Universities Survived for Nearly a Millenium
35079.authors: David M. Cutler, Edward L. Glaeser
35079.abstract: How have universities managed to survive and evolve over almost 1,000 years to become wildly heterogeneous, unusually fractious, multi-product, non-profit entities? Universities began as teachers’ guilds, and they still give faculty a remarkable degree of autonomy. That structure attracts and empowers intellectuals, who are selected in part on their taste for knowledge, and those entrepreneurs and philanthropists have enabled universities to morph in ways that firms rarely do. Intellectual autonomy can also explain why universities are so often at odds with legal authorities and why faculty fight so often with each other and with their bosses. This essay presents a model of university organization and sketches the evolution of the university’s products and conflicts over the last 900 years. We also discuss the social value of university education.
35079.zh_abstract: 大学是如何在近1000年的时间里得以存续并演变，成为高度异质、异常好争论、多产品的非营利实体的？大学最初是教师行会，如今它们仍然赋予教师非凡的自主权。这种结构吸引并赋权知识分子——这些人被选中的部分原因在于他们对知识的偏好——而这些企业家和慈善家使得大学能够以企业很少能做到的方式演变。知识自主权也可以解释为什么大学经常与法律当局发生冲突，以及为什么教师之间、教师与上司之间频繁争斗。本文提出了一个大学组织模型，并概述了过去900年里大学产品及其冲突的演变。我们还讨论了大学教育的社会价值。
35079.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I20, L22, N30

35078.title: The “Peace Dividend” of International Trade: A New Empirical Approach
35078.zh_title: 国际贸易的“和平红利”：一种新的实证方法
35078.authors: Ling Feng, Qiuyue Huang, Zhiyuan Li, Christopher M. Meissner
35078.abstract: This paper investigates the causal impact of international trade on interstate military conflicts using global bilateral data from 1962 to 2014. To address endogeneity concerns, we exploit exogenous spatial-temporal variation in international trade stemming from technological advances in air relative to maritime transport. Empirical results demonstrate a strong “peace dividend” of international trade: that is, increased trade significantly reduces the probability and intensity of conflicts between nations. This effect remains robust across specifications and withstands a wide range of potential confounders. Such findings highlight how economic interdependence shapes international conflict, a relationship that is especially relevant amid escalating geopolitical tensions and the global shift toward “decoupling”, “de-risking”, and greater trade protectionism.
35078.zh_abstract: 本文利用1962年至2014年的全球双边数据，研究了国际贸易对国家间军事冲突的因果影响。为了解决内生性问题，我们利用了源于航空运输相对于海运技术进步所带来的国际贸易外生时空变化。实证结果表明，国际贸易存在强大的“和平红利”：即贸易增长显著降低了国家间冲突的概率和强度。这一效应在各种设定下均保持稳健，并能经受住一系列潜在混杂因素的检验。这些发现凸显了经济相互依存如何塑造国际冲突，这一关系在地缘政治紧张局势升级以及全球转向“脱钩”、“去风险”和更多贸易保护主义的背景下尤其具有现实意义。

35077.title: Bilateral Conflict Risk and Trade: Military Wars, Trade Wars, and Diplomatic Noise
35077.zh_title: 双边冲突风险与贸易：军事战争、贸易战与外交噪音
35077.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Rodolphe Desbordes, Jamel Saadaoui
35077.abstract: How damaging is a “trade war” compared to a “military war” or a “war of words”? Aggregate conflict indicators cannot say, because they treat missile strikes, sanctions, and diplomatic protests as equivalent. We build a monthly bilateral indicator from GDELT event data, calibrated against human-curated ground truth, that decomposes hostility into four layers: kinetic fighting (“military war”), military posture, sanctions-context tensions (“trade war”), and routine diplomacy. The decomposed panel reveals a secular shift: over the past decade, governments have steadily substituted economic coercion for military confrontation, nearly doubling the trade-weighted share of hostility channelled through sanctions contexts. In a gravity trade model, the aggregate indicator is negative, large, and statistically significant, but the decomposition reveals that only two layers drive the result. Kinetic conflict and trade-context hostility are both economically large and precisely estimated; routine diplomacy, despite dominating measured hostility, has no trade effect at all. The directed structure uncovers a retaliation channel that compounds trade losses over several months. Our measure remains a significant determinant of bilateral trade in a horse race against the closest existing alternative. Relative to a pre-escalation baseline, the geopolitical deterioration of the past decade has put roughly $\$334$ billion of bilateral trade at risk, with the US–China pair accounting for half.
35077.zh_abstract: 与“军事战争”或“口水战”相比，“贸易战”的破坏性有多大？总体冲突指标无法回答这个问题，因为它们将导弹袭击、制裁和外交抗议等同对待。我们利用GDELT事件数据构建了一个月度双边指标，并针对人工整理的真实情况进行校准，该指标将敌对行动分解为四个层级：动能战斗（“军事战争”）、军事姿态、制裁背景下的紧张局势（“贸易战”）以及常规外交。分解后的面板数据揭示了一个长期趋势：在过去十年中，各国政府稳步地用经济胁迫替代军事对抗，通过制裁渠道传导的敌对行动在贸易加权中的份额几乎翻了一番。在一个引力贸易模型中，总体指标为负、数值大且统计显著，但分解结果显示只有两个层级驱动了这一结果。动能冲突和贸易背景下的敌对行动在经济上规模巨大且估计精确；而常规外交尽管在测量的敌对行动中占主导地位，却完全没有贸易效应。定向结构揭示了一个报复渠道，该渠道会在数月内加剧贸易损失。在与最接近的现有替代指标的对比中，我们的指标仍然是双边贸易的重要决定因素。相对于升级前的基线，过去十年的地缘政治恶化已使大约3340亿美元的双边贸易面临风险，其中美中贸易对占了一半。
35077.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：F15, F43, F5, F50, F51

35076.title: Tariffs and the Term Structure of Inflation Expectations
35076.zh_title: 关税与通胀预期的期限结构
35076.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Anthony M. Diercks, Aurélien Eyquem, Joon Kim
35076.abstract: Inflation expectations derived from financial markets exhibited unprecedented dynamics in 2025: the correlation between one-year inflation swaps and one-year-ahead one-year forward rates turned significantly negative for the first time on record. We show that this decoupling occurred primarily on days when tariff news dominated market pricing, using a two-stage event classification validated by Bloomberg news trends. Standard small open-economy New Keynesian models in which tariffs generate a one-time price-level increase imply positive comovement across horizons and cannot explain this pattern. \nWe explain these occurrences through the lens of an amended small open-economy New Keynesian model. Three ingredients prove critical for reproducing the observed negative conditional correlation between spot and forward inflation after tariff shocks: targeting year-on-year inflation, substantial interest-rate inertia, and persistent tariffs. Under empirically plausible calibrations, the model generates a negative correlation conditional on tariff shocks while preserving a positive unconditional correlation, suggesting that the 2025 twist in the term structure reflects expectations of a persistent policy response to trade shocks.
35076.zh_abstract: 从金融市场得出的通胀预期在2025年表现出前所未有的动态：一年期通胀互换与一年后的一年期远期利率之间的相关性首次出现显著负值。我们利用经彭博新闻趋势验证的两阶段事件分类法，表明这种脱钩主要发生在关税新闻主导市场定价的日子里。标准的、关税导致一次性价格水平上升的小型开放经济体新凯恩斯主义模型意味着各期限之间存在正联动，无法解释这一模式。我们通过一个修正的小型开放经济体新凯恩斯主义模型的视角来解释这些现象。对于在关税冲击后重现观察到的即期与远期通胀之间的负条件相关性，三个要素至关重要：以同比通胀率为目标、显著的利率惯性以及持续的关税。在经验上合理的校准下，该模型在关税冲击条件下产生负相关性，同时保持正的无条件相关性，这表明2025年期限结构的扭曲反映了市场预期政策将对贸易冲击做出持续性反应。

35075.title: The Impact of Maternal Education on Early Childhood Development
35075.zh_title: 母亲教育对儿童早期发展的影响
35075.authors: Moriam Khanam, Mohammad Hajizadeh, Casey Warman
35075.abstract: This study leverages exogenous variation from a secondary school stipend program for female students in rural Bangladesh to estimate the causal effect of maternal education on early childhood development. Using data from the 2019 Bangladesh Multiple Indicator Cluster Survey, we find that the five years of stipend eligibility increase mothers' schooling by about one year. Instrumental variable estimates show that an additional year of maternal education improves early childhood development scores by 0.5 points on a scale of 0-10, with gains in overall developmental readiness (7.5 percentage points) and in the literacy–numeracy (7.7 percentage points) and physical (1.9 percentage points) domains. The results are robust across specifications. We also estimate the effects of maternal education on potential mechanisms, including children's nutrition, home learning environment, parenting practices, and use of early childhood education and care. The findings show that improvements in maternal education increase weight-for-age Z-scores, reduce stunting, improve the probability of having toys from shops, and increase the likelihood of an adult household member playing with the child. The positive effects of maternal education on children's developmental outcomes imply the importance of investment in improving educational attainment, particularly for females in low- and middle-income countries.
35075.zh_abstract: 本研究利用孟加拉国农村地区一项针对女中学生的助学金项目所产生的外生变异，来估计母亲教育对儿童早期发展的因果效应。利用2019年孟加拉国多指标类集调查的数据，我们发现五年的助学金资格使母亲的受教育年限增加了大约一年。工具变量估计表明，母亲每多接受一年教育，儿童早期发展得分（0-10分制）提高0.5分，并在整体发展准备度（提高7.5个百分点）、读写-计算能力（提高7.7个百分点）和身体（提高1.9个百分点）领域取得进步。结果在各种设定下均保持稳健。我们还估计了母亲教育对潜在机制的影响，包括儿童营养、家庭学习环境、养育实践以及早期儿童教育和保育的使用。研究结果表明，母亲教育水平的提高增加了年龄别体重Z分数，减少了发育迟缓，提高了拥有商店购买玩具的概率，并增加了成年家庭成员与孩子玩耍的可能性。母亲教育对儿童发展结果的积极影响意味着，投资于提高教育程度（尤其是中低收入国家的女性）具有重要意义。
35075.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH；JEL：H52, I10, I25, J24, O15

35015.title: Market Power in Mortgage Pricing: the Role of Referral Lending
35015.zh_title: 抵押贷款定价中的市场势力：推荐贷款的作用
35015.authors: Dayin Zhang, Panle Jia Barwick, Lu Han, Jonathan Kroah
35015.abstract: Despite intense competition among mortgage lenders, borrowers face substantial price dispersion. We argue that realtor–loan officer referral networks are a key source of lender market power: by steering homebuyers toward a small set of loan officers, these networks restrict effective borrower choice even in competitive markets. Using a novel dataset linking 81,306 realtors to 102,860 loan officers across 41 states, we document that such networks are pervasive and highly concentrated — 85% of realtors direct over 40% of their clients to fewer than four loan officers — and that this concentration persists and even increases in markets with more lenders. IV estimates indicate that borrowers using referred loan officers pay 18.6 basis points higher mortgage rates, equivalent to $\$2,609$ in upfront costs on the average loan of $\$306$K. Referral lending raises rate spreads by 36.5% and accounts for half of the residual cross-sectional variation in spreads. The premium is nearly three times as large for Hispanic borrowers as for White borrowers, and is systematically higher for Black borrowers and financially constrained households. We identify two channels: referrals reduce borrowers' search intensity across lenders, and referred loan officers exercise pricing power relative to colleagues within the same institution. Efficiency gains from faster processing and reduced denial risk do not offset the additional costs.
35015.zh_abstract: 尽管抵押贷款机构之间存在激烈竞争，但借款人面临显著的价格离散。我们认为，房地产经纪人-贷款官员推荐网络是贷款机构市场势力的一个关键来源：通过将购房者引导至一小部分贷款官员，这些网络即使在竞争激烈的市场中也限制了借款人的有效选择。利用一个将41个州的81,306名房地产经纪人与102,860名贷款官员联系起来的新数据集，我们记录了此类网络普遍存在且高度集中——85%的房地产经纪人将超过40%的客户引导至少于四名贷款官员——并且这种集中度在拥有更多贷款机构的市场中持续存在甚至增加。IV估计表明，使用推荐贷款官员的借款人支付的抵押贷款利率高出18.6个基点，相当于平均30.6万美元贷款中2,609美元的前期成本。推荐贷款使利率利差提高了36.5%，并解释了利差横截面残差变异的一半。对于西班牙裔借款人，这一溢价几乎是白人借款人的三倍，并且对于黑人借款人和财务受限家庭系统性更高。我们识别出两个渠道：推荐减少了借款人在不同贷款机构间的搜索强度，并且被推荐的贷款官员相对于同一机构内的同事行使定价权。更快处理和降低拒绝风险带来的效率提升并不能抵消额外成本。
35015.meta: Programs：IO, LE；JEL：D40, G21, L14, L85, R31

35042.title: Building Opportunity: The Intergenerational Effects of Chilean School Construction
35042.zh_title: 创造机会：智利学校建设的代际效应
35042.abstract: In 1965–1966, Chile built and staffed thousands of new primary classrooms in supply-constrained communities. Using a quasi-experimental design and large census samples, we show that childhood exposure to school construction substantially improved the schooling and labor market outcomes of adults and closed a persistent female disadvantage in school attainment. Women’s exposure to the policy had large intergenerational spillovers on their children’s on-time grade progression and completed schooling. The marginal value of public funds is 13, including direct effects on adults and intergenerational spillovers.
35042.zh_abstract: 在1965-1966年间，智利在供给受限的社区新建并配备了数千间小学教室。利用准实验设计和大规模人口普查样本，我们表明，童年时期接触学校建设显著改善了成年人的教育和劳动力市场成果，并消除了女性在教育程度上的长期劣势。女性接触该政策对其子女的按时升学率和完成学业产生了巨大的代际溢出效应。公共资金的边际价值为13，这包括了成年人的直接效应和代际溢出效应。
35042.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I24, I25, I28, J16, O15
